PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
**_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |
---
Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

**As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities.**

**_But I need you in this fight with me:_**

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Nancy Pelosi was the first woman to serve as House speaker and has done so with grace, grit, and intelligence. She has ALWAYS put our Democracy first and deserves respect and gratitude. We’re sending her this MASSIVE digital card to tell her THANK YOU for all she’s done as House Speaker. And we want you to be the first to sign! [There are only [10] slots available for Pennsylvania Democrats to sign Nancy Pelosi’s Thank You card. Please add your name now:]() | She’s going to LOVE this, Team Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress , please .

| | With Thanksgiving just 1 week away, and the price of groceries skyrocketing, I just can't stand the thought of another wounded hero having to resort to a public food pantry to feed their family. I hope you'll consider supporting our program "Thanking a Veteran" with a tax-deductible [_Thanksgiving "Thank You" Meal gift today_ _._ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUU1v4yAQ_TXOLRZgxx8HH7rbpivtbrVqm_RoTWBso2JIAbfK_vqOE7eHSAiY94aZNw9seFFUdVUXGVupJhfAO7nSjWBCcC44Y4zOlNdlVStEIRXPeVkkOcMRtEk7jxgHbV_RK4pPqXTjamgOtWR1VdW5YgwOJe-AqvC8KKhAVVIH0wwxHkOS3SRiSyuAmSIO6B2G1Pl-RrNt5_yYZLfb3cPT_e9fu393j4kojA6RwC4qCqY4tiMqPc15Z0kLGNzkJRJopWlhPBrdnRZKUgi6t0TOQ_JqLR0YHbWz0V2EwIheSwgXQa1yFmZ6vjh_mDzC1F6P3sYB7Gvo9bu2fXvwjgjosV2sZF_dqQvaeFG2vrPPFuDtGTZEt9ZoRcQVOGgVZq1vL-HP48fNyjfq-KEN-VCU9BH9-SNm35cxm6T8kQhxfibE2WIxxWwPu91ff1rvN__X95u96GdS_KQ9no74nbkUSRczRVLefgJedrMc)PLEASE DO SO QUICKLY!
The stress from massive inflation is impacting our wounded warriors. ** They are struggling to pay for basic human necessities** like heat and shelter and continue to experience overwhelming powerlessness to provide for their families.

* Thanksgiving gift of **$70** can help provide a Thanksgiving meal for **ONE** severely disabled military hero and their family.
* Your donation of **$140** can help feed **TWO** struggling military families.
* A contribution of **$210** can provide Thanksgiving meals for **THREE** families, and so on. (And smaller gifts can be combined to help a family in need.)

Will you join me in thanking our post 9-11 combat-wounded disabled veterans TODAY.... with a special [Thanksgiving Thank You Meal donation](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUctOwzAQ_Jrk1ijepHkcciiUgngJAS3HyLU3iYVjB9uhKl-P0wYOlSzbO7P2zs5iRbKsKIsyS-KQVylQ0rBQVBADEAIkjmN_RqTMi5IjAuMkJXkWpDH2VMioMYiuE-oTDffxMWK6D7uqYUg5ibGAZZEkaYqM5zTlDSsLZClnoaw65wYbJKsANn5ZKkeHHRqNNtKmndBk02jTB8l6s31-u324277cvAaQSWGdBxvHfTC6vu6Ri3HKO0maQatHw9CDisma9oMUzXGmmA-paJUnpyZJsWCaSuGEVk6fhdAejWDUngXVXCs60dNFm_1okI71Zeu166j6tK34Fqqt90Z7grZYz1bGf9V9FVTurGxxWN8_36mB3bx7ulZScE9cgJ3gdtL69WEfXw-r0FR8OAjpfchyP4j2NIjJ97nNKsivAoDTM4CTxTC6ZEe32ydzXOyWP4vb5Q7aiYRrv7vjgP-Z8yfRbCYE-foXPlm0CQ) for their family?

body:

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919424:J-s1emGBN:m:1:3374012347:B06E07248E64022D00F5FE26AAD8BA67:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919424:J-s1emGBN:m:1:3374012347:B06E07248E64022D00F5FE26AAD8BA67:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919424:J-s1emGBN:m:1:3374012347:B06E07248E64022D00F5FE26AAD8BA67:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919424:J-s1emGBN:m:1:3374012347:B06E07248E64022D00F5FE26AAD8BA67:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919424:J-s1emGBN:m:1:3374012347:B06E07248E64022D00F5FE26AAD8BA67:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919424:J-s1emGBN:m:1:3374012347:B06E07248E64022D00F5FE26AAD8BA67:r)

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Virginia
body:
After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we keep building on this powerful momentum. | | |
---
| | We just learned we are going to have an ultra-competitive special election on January 10th, 2023 because of the midterm's results: Virginia Democrats will have a chance to replace an anti-abortion Republican with a strong Democratic leader who will fight to secure a better future for their state in Virginia’s state legislature – **_and this election will be ultra-competitive._** **After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we continue this powerful momentum – and that could start with flipping this seat from red to blue.** The Virginia Senate is in play next year and special elections like this are vital opportunities to set state Democrats on a path to success. **Special elections can come down to just one or two votes – that’s why we’re pulling out _all_ the stops to ensure state Democrats are well-equipped to win this seat. clean_body: After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we keep building on this powerful momentum. | | | | | We just learned we are going to have an ultra-competitive special election on January 10th, 2023 because of the midterm's results: Virginia Democrats will have a chance to replace an anti-abortion Republican with a strong Democratic leader who will fight to secure a better future for their state in Virginia’s state legislature – and this election will be ultra-competitive. After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we continue this powerful momentum – and that could start with flipping this seat from red to blue. The Virginia Senate is in play next year and special elections like this are vital opportunities to set state Democrats on a path to success. Special elections can come down to just one or two votes – that’s why we’re pulling out all the stops to ensure state Democrats are well-equipped to win this seat. body:
| | | **$5** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today.

Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.

Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 20 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $5 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please: Will you split $5 now between me and the DSCC to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia and across the country?**

**Here's a special link just for you:****[www.dscc.org/georgiarunoff](https://go.dscc.org/go/11024?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221120-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockThreeDollar-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221120-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockThreeDollar-Pros-sl1&akid=8745%2E9716520%2ErffLvs)**

Thank you for pitching in. I truly appreciate your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re going to a runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next few weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next few weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

Hi Peter -- this is Steve Scalise.
[**House Republicans JUST won back the House and selected me to be their next Majority Leader. Now that it 's official, I'm humbly asking you to endorse our new GOP leadership team using this secure link.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923779:63oCqmGNA:m:1:3253819041:9225177ABD6151D4E46D859FE12714A4:r)
Nothing made me happier than seeing Republicans taking back the House Majority. After two years of total Democrat control in Washington, we finally have a Republican FIREWALL to block Joe Biden's radical agenda.
The Radical Left's tirade to keep our borders open, undermine voter ID laws and election integrity, spend trillions in taxpayer dollars on Liberal pet projects, and federalize our elections will officially come to a grinding halt. But this fight won't be easy. Democrats still have control of the Senate and White House, so we need to make sure Republicans EVERYWHERE stand with our new House Majority.
[**Will you go on the record in support of our new leadership team? We need 100% participation from all our grassroots team!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923779:63oCqmGNA:m:1:3253819041:9225177ABD6151D4E46D859FE12714A4:r)
I appreciate your help today,
Steve Scalise
Republican Majority Leader-elect

body:
Be the first Republican to respond to our 2023 GOP Audit >>>
**We SAVED our America First movement, SAVED our Conservative Supreme Court Majority, SAVED energy independence, AND SAVED our Pro-Life movement!**
Now House Republican Leadership is scheduling their very first meetings for the upcoming Congress and we need to get some basic information from our greatest supporters like you.
**[COMPLETE YOUR 2023 GOP AUDIT NOW ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923977:6sXGqmGYN:m:1:3253819041:5A9F14D6132096EA33F0ADEBB0EA2DC0:r)**
This is your very FIRST CHANCE to have a direct line of communication with Republican Leadership AND chart the course for the objectives of our Congress this upcoming year. The economy, crime, and defending personal liberty are our top priorities. [**But what are yours, Peter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923977:6sXGqmGYN:m:1:3253819041:5A9F14D6132096EA33F0ADEBB0EA2DC0:r)
Let us know by 11:59 PM tonight to be the very FIRST Republican from your area to influence our party's agenda this upcoming year.
We can't thank you enough for your input,
House Conservatives

name: John N. Kennedy
subject: My mind was BLOWN.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Wow!

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923995:J5NdqmGNF:m:1:3331703221:99EAFC6427596014A5B7874C66AF2355:r)
---
Peter,

I was riding in the car earlier today, and BANG!

Reality set in, and I came to a huge realization.

Once the Left gets their ducks in a row, they will be back to their old tricks. The red wave didn't pan out how we expected it, and the left will go into overtime to advance their radical agenda. **[I'll keep fighting until I'm out of breath, and we're not out of this fight yet.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923995:J5NdqmGNF:m:1:3331703221:99EAFC6427596014A5B7874C66AF2355:r)**
| [**HELP ME FIGHT BACK**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923996:J5NdqmGNF:m:1:3331703221:99EAFC6427596014A5B7874C66AF2355:r)
---

I KNOW we did our best here in Louisiana. We had a **MASSIVE** victory, but unfortunately, we still have a lot of work to do to turn our country around. We don't have time to sit around and cry over spilt milk. We need to get back on our feet and start fighting like the future of the country depends on it. Because it does.

**[Much like how a radical woker can't live without a $20 soy milk latte, I can't live without your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923995:J5NdqmGNF:m:1:3331703221:99EAFC6427596014A5B7874C66AF2355:r)**

The days ahead will be long and arduous. I'm sure there will be many things said in Washington over the next few months that will make me wish I could bash my head against the wall. **[However, I'm 100% confident it will be worth it, we're in this together, and we're not going to stop fighting, EVER.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923995:J5NdqmGNF:m:1:3331703221:99EAFC6427596014A5B7874C66AF2355:r)**

**_I 'm asking for your support -- do you have my back in the fight against the radical left?_**

Peter,

I was riding in the car earlier today, and BANG!

Reality set in, and I came to a huge realization.

Once the Left gets their ducks in a row, they will be back to their old tricks. The red wave didn't pan out how we expected it, and the left will go into overtime to advance their radical agenda. **[I'll keep fighting until I'm out of breath, and we're not out of this fight yet.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924017:6ppcqmG5N:m:1:3317145305:A9C42FF8F1C58AE1EF1EF69337B2969A:r)**

We don't have time to sit around and cry over spilt milk. We need to get back on our feet and start fighting like the future of the country depends on it. Because it does.

**[Much like how a radical woker can't live without a $20 soy milk latte, I can't live without your support.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924017:6ppcqmG5N:m:1:3317145305:A9C42FF8F1C58AE1EF1EF69337B2969A:r)**

body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924549:JpUJ4mGND:m:1:3374012347:0CECA88B7E330D63AEEB926D7AC41645:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924549:JpUJ4mGND:m:1:3374012347:0CECA88B7E330D63AEEB926D7AC41645:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924549:JpUJ4mGND:m:1:3374012347:0CECA88B7E330D63AEEB926D7AC41645:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924549:JpUJ4mGND:m:1:3374012347:0CECA88B7E330D63AEEB926D7AC41645:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924754:6LYr5mGNN:m:1:3331703221:6D534C2B21868F579D9E4681396A6A1A:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924754:6LYr5mGNN:m:1:3331703221:6D534C2B21868F579D9E4681396A6A1A:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924754:6LYr5mGNN:m:1:3331703221:6D534C2B21868F579D9E4681396A6A1A:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924754:6LYr5mGNN:m:1:3331703221:6D534C2B21868F579D9E4681396A6A1A:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924754:6LYr5mGNN:m:1:3331703221:6D534C2B21868F579D9E4681396A6A1A:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Herschel & Lindsey
subject: The #34 Challenge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter,

Sean Hannity challenged us on national tv.

Well...actually, he challenged _Lindsey_. Sean doubted that Lindsey could 10 or even 20 push-ups.

When the interview ended, Lindsey came up with the #34 Challenge.

**[You won't believe what happened next. You've got to see this:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924868:JYdR5mGoN:m:1:3317145305:2E4C2D56822EBDC82BCA0940004C0875:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924868:JYdR5mGoN:m:1:3317145305:2E4C2D56822EBDC82BCA0940004C0875:r)
_**Will you take the #34 Challenge?**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924868:JYdR5mGoN:m:1:3317145305:2E4C2D56822EBDC82BCA0940004C0875:r)

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924544:634kUmG8N:m:1:3374627611:A4B6078B25AE3A777B8A1E0D839CBE89:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924544:634kUmG8N:m:1:3374627611:A4B6078B25AE3A777B8A1E0D839CBE89:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924544:634kUmG8N:m:1:3374627611:A4B6078B25AE3A777B8A1E0D839CBE89:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924544:634kUmG8N:m:1:3374627611:A4B6078B25AE3A777B8A1E0D839CBE89:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924544:634kUmG8N:m:1:3374627611:A4B6078B25AE3A777B8A1E0D839CBE89:r)

Herschel Walker

| | Peter,

I just got an urgent email from Herschel Walker and I need you to read it right away.

The 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat in Georgia simply isn't an option. The good news is, we can still help Herschel Walker flip Georgia but he needs you on his team.

Every liberal in the country will be coming after Herschel during this runoff. _**[We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61923991:65i9UmGZN:m:1:3253819041:923414E25AAA6E6C9CC90C34FC51D4C6:r "We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.")**_

Millions more will be spent to hold this seat for Raphael Warnock on top of the $101 million he's already raised from liberal donors all over the country.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this time due to only 554 votes. These contests can turn on razor-thin margins. Georgia is the second most expensive state to vote in, costing .98 cents for each person to vote. President Biden won Georgia by only 12,670 votes in 2020, and Raphael Warnock needs your help.
body:
Sen. Herschel Walker?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3269f750-522a-4031-ab58-c460794beb9d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between a Senator Warnock and a Senator (gulp...) Herschel Walker._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2e592fe-2aba-482e-894d-617ad9fca52f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this time due to only 554 votes. 554. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right._** **_Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast.__ _** **_It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor._ **
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82b77117-a25b-433e-9b1a-654c88412140/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_In only six days--next Saturday--early voting in Georgia begins. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker? _** [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get Georgia Democrats to the polls to strengthen The Peach State and America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta206e075-68ce-485e-96e4-48e08f3cfe86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy.**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right. Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast. It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor. | | | | | | | | | In only six days--next Saturday--early voting in Georgia begins. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker? We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy. name: Latinos for Herschel
subject: Even President Trump Noticed our efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Latinos for America First**
body:
So much is at stake--it's a national emergency!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926031:6RyyRmGVN:m:1:3253819041:96707B41A3C7268D246712798E684E5E:r "Headline") Peter: We've been in Georgia since last Monday helping Herschel win his runoff. But I wanted to send you a quick note. This year's election marked a milestone for Latino voters, especially those who chose to vote Republican. For many, it was their first time registered as a GOP voter, and like you, I'm disappointed it wasn't enough to deliver the Red Wave as hoped. But we have a choice to make - **sulk ... or do something about it.** Well, our organization is doing something about it! Herschel saw a huge turnout of support from the Latino voters in Georgia and we need to make sure they vote for the GOP candidate on December 6th! **[Help us turn out the Latino voters for Herschel with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926031:6RyyRmGVN:m:1:3253819041:96707B41A3C7268D246712798E684E5E:r "Help us turn out the Latino voters for Herschel with your $25, $50,
or $100 donation today!")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926031:6RyyRmGVN:m:1:3253819041:96707B41A3C7268D246712798E684E5E:r "Sign")Latinos for America First is all-in for the Georgia runoff!
* We're putting volunteers on the ground to walk Latino neighborhoods. In fact, we've already knocked over 1,000 doors!
* We're buying digital ads that target Georgia's Latino voters and are looking to place ads on the local Hispanic stations as well.
* Most importantly, we're ramping up our Get-Out-The-Vote program to make sure these Latino voters show up to vote for Herschel on December 6th!

**All of this takes money ... and money that we don't have.** $76,276.87 to be exact if we're going to have any chance to fully fund our run-off program **We saw how our efforts in the Latino communities made an impact for GOP candidates across the country. Even President Trump remarked in his 2024 campaign announcement of the huge gains the GOP made in the Latino community during this election.** These efforts take money and if we're going to turn out the Latino voters for Herschel on December 6th, we need to have your support NOW. **[Will you help us today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926031:6RyyRmGVN:m:1:3253819041:96707B41A3C7268D246712798E684E5E:r "Will you help us today?")** | | [CHIP IN $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926032:6RyyRmGVN:m:1:3253819041:96707B41A3C7268D246712798E684E5E:r "CHIP IN $50")
---
| [CHIP IN $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926033:6RyyRmGVN:m:1:3253819041:96707B41A3C7268D246712798E684E5E:r "CHIP IN $100")
---
| [CHIP IN $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926034:6RyyRmGVN:m:1:3253819041:96707B41A3C7268D246712798E684E5E:r "CHIP IN $250")
---
So much is at stake--it's a national emergency. We can't let the Democrats gain the majority in the Senate and continue to push for abortion-on-demand, same-sex marriage, defunding the police, or continuing their socialist economic policies that caused inflation and high interest rates.
Help us push Herschel to victory by making sure the Latino voters show up and vote Red. **[Donate today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926031:6RyyRmGVN:m:1:3253819041:96707B41A3C7268D246712798E684E5E:r "Donate today!")**
For America,
Bianca Gracia
Founder
Latinos for America First PAC

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Why we need to win in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm really grateful you chose to open this email. Now, I have another request - **can you please read it all the way through?** I promise I'll keep it short.

Herschel Walker is competing against Democrat Raphael Warnock in a runoff election. For the short two years he's already been in the Senate, Warnock has been a rubber stamp for the radical Left's agenda. _Can you imagine the damage he would cause if elected to a full six-year term?_

Herschel's runoff is two weeks away, and he let me know he's worried he may not have the resources to keep up with his opponent - on TV, on volunteer recruitment, online, or even at the ballot box.

I'm reaching out because I'm hoping you will see how important Herschel's race is. **[I'm not asking for much, just $25 can make a difference in this tight race:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926149:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "I’m not asking for much, just $10 can make a difference in this tight race:")**
---
| | | [SEND $25 TO HERSCHEL](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926149:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "SEND $10 TO HERSCHEL")
---
We simply can't afford to fall short of his goal today. Herschel and I would both be thrilled to see you step up.

Thank you,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926149:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "SMR Headshot")
---

Marco Rubio

| | | [SEND $25 TO HERSCHEL](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926149:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "SEND $10 TO HERSCHEL")
---
| | |

* * *

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926150:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/american-dream-footer/?recurring=true")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926150:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "Join my fight
to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926150:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926151:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "Stop the Dems Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926151:6lUERmGlN:m:1:3361486117:94AECB215710242F3C3B09358FF879E6:r "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s all going to come down to turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924579:J-AoRmGNO:m:1:3372944669:A2D9A4905278409F4F399F76DFDEB99C:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924579:J-AoRmGNO:m:1:3372944669:A2D9A4905278409F4F399F76DFDEB99C:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924579:J-AoRmGNO:m:1:3372944669:A2D9A4905278409F4F399F76DFDEB99C:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924579:J-AoRmGNO:m:1:3372944669:A2D9A4905278409F4F399F76DFDEB99C:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924579:J-AoRmGNO:m:1:3372944669:A2D9A4905278409F4F399F76DFDEB99C:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924579:J-AoRmGNO:m:1:3372944669:A2D9A4905278409F4F399F76DFDEB99C:r)

clean_body: | Peter, Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th. Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible. Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on. Today's Goal: Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters. How we win: By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th. We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want. I sincerely hope you'll answer the call. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but {{unsubscribeUrl}}. Some believe that Trump incited the January 6th protest turning into what later came to be described as a riot. Although Trump never tweeted anything [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ After 2022 Setback, GOP Race for 2024 Is Wide Open The 2022 midterm elections were, by any objective measure, tremendously disappointing for Republicans. As has already been discussed ad nauseam, the “red wave” that so many—yours truly included—had predicted simply did not materialize. The reasons for that are numerous; no one individual, one institution, or one specific systemic failure is to blame. name: Herschel Walker
subject: He now has 900 campaign staff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924903:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924903:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924903:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924903:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924903:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924903:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924903:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924904:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924905:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924906:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924907:J2dAgmGFN:m:1:3317145305:15E4169C6B0EF05006976E704A8C48D8:r)

| | |
Peter,
Herschel Walker and far-Left Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock is going to a RUNOFF.
**_This race is going to decide the future of our country, Peter, and we cannot afford to have any dedicated patriots like you sit on the sidelines._**

If we are going to win in December, **ALL** of our **TOP** supporters need to stand with Senate Republicans from now until then. This is ALL OR NOTHING.
Our records indicate that you're in the 95th percentile of active donors in YOUR CITY. With the runoff election only 26 days away, we HAVE to keep pace with Raphael Warnock's mega-millionaire donors if we're going to take back our Majority, and that's why we're calling on you, Peter.
_Please. We desperately need you when it counts the most._

[_**Contribute $45 or more in the NEXT 20 MINUTES to help us crush our CRITICAL fundraising goal and restore President Trump 's majority in the Senate.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61925144:JqGbgmG5N:m:1:3331703221:B3BC9B48EC43D62B76DFC84C939D23A1:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need you to stay on the field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | | **RUNOFF ELECTION ALERT!!**
**Runoff announced for Dec. 6**
---

Peter - my goal was to beat Senator Raphael Warnock outright on Election Day.

But neither of us got more than 50% of the vote, so now we're headed to a runoff election in Georgia.

**_In other words, my race for Senate just went into OVERTIME._**

[SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927629:6c5xjyGN_:m:1:3346849603:08B9F06A51B41F83F347E21171E909AA:r)
---

I can tell you from my football days that overtime is the ultimate test of a team's grit and determination. Overtime is grueling when you've been playing hard for four quarters. But we need to leave it all on the field if we're going to pull off this win.

[STAY ON THE FIELD FOR OVERTIME](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927629:6c5xjyGN_:m:1:3346849603:08B9F06A51B41F83F347E21171E909AA:r)
---

**If Republicans lose to Raphael Warnock for the second time in a row, Georgia will have two Democrat senators for at least the next four years.**
_ _
We have a clear path to stop this liberal takeover of the Peach State._We must knock on every door, call every voter, and leave no stone unturned. But that only happens if every conservative pitches in._

[SAVE GEORGIA NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927629:6c5xjyGN_:m:1:3346849603:08B9F06A51B41F83F347E21171E909AA:r)
---

Raphael Warnock and Chuck Schumer have virtually unlimited resources to blanket Georgia with ads, but our resources are depleted after a long and expensive campaign. We need immediate support to flip this seat **RED** and execute our plan.

**_[Please, will you rush $35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927629:6c5xjyGN_:m:1:3346849603:08B9F06A51B41F83F347E21171E909AA:r "Please, Peter, will you rush
$35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?")_**

Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker
| |

With an open State Senate seat, Democrats have a chance to expand the Democrats’ Senate Brick Wall.

|

– The Georgia Senate Run-off is in 15 days!!
– Democrat Raphael Warnock was only a slim 35,000 votes ahead.
– And the polls are showing his runoff in a DEAD-HEAT.
– If he’s elected, we’ll ELIMINATE Joe Manchin’s power-hold on the Senate.
– But National Republicans are racing to bury him with attack ads in Georgia.
– So we’re FIGHTING BACK! We need to send $10,000 to his campaign IMMEDIATELY so we can grow our Senate Majority and save our democracy!
But the harsh reality is: This race is going to be close. And unless we send $10,000 to Rev. Warnock’s immediately, we could fall short of the critical resources needed to grow our Senate Majority and save our democracy. subject: I’m getting concerned

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924738:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924738:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924738:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924738:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924738:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924738:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924739:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924740:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924741:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924742:J7nosyGQN:m:1:3369487795:0FA885C9F9B6956E58427E79888BB687:r)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Bill O'Reilly Exposes Biden Inflation Reduction Smokescreen
body:
**Bill O'Reilly Unravels: Biden 's Hidden Inflation Plot**

**Biden is powerless to break the stranglehold of record inflation**

His Fed's skyrocketing interest rates aren't taming inflation

**They are forcing us into recession**

Biden's Inflation Reduction Act doesn't reduce inflation,

It funds a left-wing spending spree by **_[taxing your retirement accounts](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccc1ed086f334a98ae169fc9119a7692&_e=tINR2pZPTKtXscmrmahQD-0Zuya1EkLFx5hJJTJE8UdBShkfUwqe_WeGCgDmfXka3ymFTpwcZRAuWfGeMySEZyhDxFZ5LjsKm7jAiVWPEy5OsDj2mplM7sR-feh7DLf7fqpl5NuA16FaXPsFWtfMyyyWjk7aBGli8k0lOfLtrf0Jz2v5g-AkUsnfo4ZhbJZ9qUEtAUYe-w0QgqFC-oFRmy8M-1-jKmQDZ84eUYzlMAXxGKPGQVbKNE0bnH61aDs1sC4pZiIUamLaEt_6K0AF84y7rVsk6FeFKHpeWImVJa8AwjcfSkOMN-VFOP29rGsPTgba-3Q-p5A6P9w284DBASAcM1XOXa3UK7bVKD5bpcUQHH0YN5JvnYMumYTM8EIBzVti7NatFtiU2FBpDNv_5wUe56bs9EO1CsGcT8cz2KzZdndno08-tcLQ9A3UVpy-Ab-djyt_oQ0TnP15iWe5leWQcBXJv-NrY3g2VljrToY9KiMIh9-TynvEv6OUWtpKQnly_deT-V0xShfmx9UxuA%3D%3D)_******

**The only things the Democrats are delivering are inflation, recession, interest rate hikes, market volatility and drained IRAs.**

subject: Early voting starts this Saturday: Raphael Warnock’s campaign needs your support to get their message out on television, on the radio, and online, as well as to keep contacting voters on the phone and at the door.
body:
Warnock knows how to win
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07dbb10e-adf5-4d01-9c45-7feeb00ff347/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_If there is anyone who knows how to win a race in Georgia, it is Senator Raphael Warnock. It may be hard to believe, but he's won 3 statewide elections in Georgia in just 2 years!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc964d8e5-3ab6-4d3b-8c90-6a2639db2fd7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The special election in November of 2020, the runoff January 5th, 2021 and November 8th. Now we know if he has the resources, he'll do it again on December 6th, when he takes on Herschel Walker, whose latest speech debated whether vampires or werewolves would win in a fight (I wish I were kidding. I am not. I guess he cherished "The Twilight Saga")._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Raphael Warnock for Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf913782-2ce5-4a78-9449-f36d127441bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Still, Senator Warnock has been falling behind in fundraising every day, and a Republican campaign group just announced another $14 million to run ads against him._** **We must do all we can to help him make up the ground. Or instead of Georgia's Senator being a scholar who bestrides a pulpit once occupied by Martin Luther King, Jr., it may become someone who's brain is occupied by werewolf vs vampire battles.** Raphael Warnock’s campaign needs your support to get their message out on television, on the radio, and online, as well as to keep contacting voters on the phone and at the door. **[Can you please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Senator Raphael Warnock, so he can make up his fundraising shortfall today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecb3f6e0-08f1-44f5-9317-56fd65560a43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you, Blue Amp Action Community!**
---
Cliff

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021 [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0152%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PYAjmHa2hhxoA8ppBF7z9w&sysid=1)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40489%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=12qTSkHiL0bid6YkodG9uQ&sysid=1)

| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40480%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SMbphHf1EXHRakhlKUcDaA&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40481%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tOK8%2f7ibZ6nqBc5wMYAydQ&sysid=1)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40481%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tOK8%2f7ibZ6nqBc5wMYAydQ&sysid=1)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40482%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=doiFMsk%2b4Z%2fav5ciOwt%2bTg&sysid=1)

body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927662:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927662:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927662:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927662:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927662:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927662:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927663:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927664:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927665:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927666:J9K_TyGaN:m:1:3350876382:1F4453CF6B61E3D56B5B7D9EEAB0B355:r)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh71fcn42bcfme5e7ci8jh44tct444vg20tdjf7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob4c3h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2kc53pn67ajuccbgkln2fmhebsg3gr1kte7qjp0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob4c3h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj4aebrascdl3t9fp8rv31k1o7roa862n5pj32j8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob4c3h2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5v79fpdt9hqb2084nqhfrv4q2b2ug89q70n3hn0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob4c3h2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z177mn52mehasscqk2u9b9k4l6seibrc5n5u511g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob4c3h2bs)

| Peter,
How do Republicans make sure our slim majority is one that actually serves the AMERICAN PEOPLE and not the corrupt Swamp?
By passing new rules that will DRAIN that Swamp, and kick the corrupt Washington forces out of the 118th Congress faster than conservatives kicked Liz Cheney out of Wyoming!!!
Because Peter, the broken House rules that are in place right now are not a "bug" of the system... They are a FEATURE. These rules are purposefully convoluted so that corrupt, bad decisions do not get EXPOSED, and so that your leaders are not PUNISHED when they betray your interests!
But this can be the term when we end that system right here and now.
Here are 3 simple steps that will instantly rein in the Swamp, and show them that our MAGA Majority is NOT for sale!
---
| | [SUPPORT THIS AGENDA? CLICK HERE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014-MNetmXE0K7Kuk9UX_ZxiqkHwhMS5Ps8_7M-YZwA1Npq668KkPF8GvTiI-Jao_w9h0DnTaXXo2w0pVPXiBzGEwoDhedEQCFGuAQXSlLoiKtiVx7Tf70GE2u9Re-o6k9IU94B7JFVOx2T-Zi9OvwselqGqP9p8Cb36m0TslAuK3PFyacLmHrP7yHQ20abdPVe1lMptu3GnmC6USO70kgpgFQqxI4GTcb&c=Osecv_6ep6ZcA7fZyD88hyDaBVt-DeNJZrvN5grAx_JonhH2I_TyZQ==&ch=Z3TOni7iGkAnIg-4CFPnWOvp9tLIaSP2re5F_Pe2A5mrQ60DC-L3Jg==)
---
|
* We should BAN the dirty money of the federal lobbyists and PACs. When your leaders take hundreds of thousands of dollars in lobbyist cash, they work for THEM more than YOU!

* We should BAN members of Congress from becoming lobbyists and trading individual stocks. No more diluting the trust of the American people to go on insider trading sprees!

* And we should BAN ridiculous, multi-subject bills that force you to vote on agriculture alongside war declarations! Let's limit legislation to a "single-subject rule" like we do here in the free state of Florida, and stop this nonsense that does NOT serve the American people!

---
| | [HELP GAETZ DRAIN THE SWAMP!!!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014-MNetmXE0K7Kuk9UX_ZxiqkHwhMS5Ps8_7M-YZwA1Npq668KkPF8GvTiI-Jao_w9h0DnTaXXo2w0pVPXiBzGEwoDhedEQCFGuAQXSlLoiKtiVx7Tf70GE2u9Re-o6k9IU94B7JFVOx2T-Zi9OvwselqGqP9p8Cb36m0TslAuK3PFyacLmHrP7yHQ20abdPVe1lMptu3GnmC6USO70kgpgFQqxI4GTcb&c=Osecv_6ep6ZcA7fZyD88hyDaBVt-DeNJZrvN5grAx_JonhH2I_TyZQ==&ch=Z3TOni7iGkAnIg-4CFPnWOvp9tLIaSP2re5F_Pe2A5mrQ60DC-L3Jg==)
---
| I'll work with whoever I need to in order to get these reforms passed into the House Rules for ALL Americans.
This isn't about Republican vs. Democrat. It's about THE PEOPLE vs. THE SWAMP!
And I believe we can end the Swamp corruption right here and now if we want to actually be bold and fight.
If you want to see the 118th Congress go in that direction... [Let me know right now.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014-MNetmXE0K7Kuk9UX_ZxiqkHwhMS5Ps8_7M-YZwA1Npq668KkPF8GvTiI-Jao_w9h0DnTaXXo2w0pVPXiBzGEwoDhedEQCFGuAQXSlLoiKtiVx7Tf70GE2u9Re-o6k9IU94B7JFVOx2T-Zi9OvwselqGqP9p8Cb36m0TslAuK3PFyacLmHrP7yHQ20abdPVe1lMptu3GnmC6USO70kgpgFQqxI4GTcb&c=Osecv_6ep6ZcA7fZyD88hyDaBVt-DeNJZrvN5grAx_JonhH2I_TyZQ==&ch=Z3TOni7iGkAnIg-4CFPnWOvp9tLIaSP2re5F_Pe2A5mrQ60DC-L3Jg==)

clean_body: 👋 Lobbyists, PACs, and Inside Traders! 👋 | | | | | == | | == | Peter, How do Republicans make sure our slim majority is one that actually serves the AMERICAN PEOPLE and not the corrupt Swamp? By passing new rules that will DRAIN that Swamp, and kick the corrupt Washington forces out of the 118th Congress faster than conservatives kicked Liz Cheney out of Wyoming!!! Because Peter, the broken House rules that are in place right now are not a "bug" of the system... They are a FEATURE. These rules are purposefully convoluted so that corrupt, bad decisions do not get EXPOSED, and so that your leaders are not PUNISHED when they betray your interests! But this can be the term when we end that system right here and now. Here are 3 simple steps that will instantly rein in the Swamp, and show them that our MAGA Majority is NOT for sale! | | == | We should BAN the dirty money of the federal lobbyists and PACs. When your leaders take hundreds of thousands of dollars in lobbyist cash, they work for THEM more than YOU! We should BAN members of Congress from becoming lobbyists and trading individual stocks. No more diluting the trust of the American people to go on insider trading sprees! * And we should BAN ridiculous, multi-subject bills that force you to vote on agriculture alongside war declarations! Let's limit legislation to a "single-subject rule" like we do here in the free state of Florida, and stop this nonsense that does NOT serve the American people! | | == | I'll work with whoever I need to in order to get these reforms passed into the House Rules for ALL Americans. This isn't about Republican vs. Democrat. It's about THE PEOPLE vs. THE SWAMP! And I believe we can end the Swamp corruption right here and now if we want to actually be bold and fight. If you want to see the 118th Congress go in that direction... == | | == | Thanks for supporting this agenda and helping me Drain the Swamp! | == | Matt Gaetz | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | | | | | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Esther, FL 32569 | == | == Sent by mailto:campaign@mattgaetzforflorida.com

body:

Peter,

**The Senate runoff in Georgia on December 6th will impact every single American.**

Inflation, recession, crime, unsecure borders, woke policies...and all the other lovely gifts from the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer cabal are only going to get worse unless we break the liberal chokehold on power.

Unless you want to see more one-party Democrat rule in Washington, **[I need you to stop what you are doing and make the largest possible donation you can directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930101:6JE68yGNr:m:1:3373497171:2A619541C1EC7AA4BC11F2C9F86344D9:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930101:6JE68yGNr:m:1:3373497171:2A619541C1EC7AA4BC11F2C9F86344D9:r)
We cannot allow Warnock to win. **Peter, that means we must help fund Herschel's runoff efforts against Warnock's multi-million-dollar war chest.**

| **RUNOFF DONOR FILE**
**SUPPORTER:** Peter
**RUNOFF EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION:** [$34](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930101:6JE68yGNr:m:1:3373497171:2A619541C1EC7AA4BC11F2C9F86344D9:r)

[** CONTRIBUTE NOW -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930101:6JE68yGNr:m:1:3373497171:2A619541C1EC7AA4BC11F2C9F86344D9:r)

We are at a crucial decision point. Either we help Herschel win...or we will watch the woke mob torch our nation's history.

Senator Warnock represents the failed values and policies of Big Government Socialism. Herschel wants to restore America with common sense values and policies that work.

That leads me to the heart of this email.

_Who would you like to see in the Senate from Georgia, Peter?_

Do you want to continue down the destructive path of Big Government Socialism with Warnock - or get back to an America that works for all Americans with Herschel?

**[Please go here to make an emergency donation directly to Herschel's campaign.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930101:6JE68yGNr:m:1:3373497171:2A619541C1EC7AA4BC11F2C9F86344D9:r)**

Thank you,

| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Peter.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929996:65cv8yGNF:m:1:3317145305:1D68567EAD310CA84167C786BEBAFC28:r "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative
supporter!")**_

name: Latinos for Herschel
subject: Even President Trump Noticed our efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Latinos for America First**
body:
So much is at stake--it's a national emergency!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927621:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "Headline") Peter: We've been in Georgia since last Monday helping Herschel win his runoff. But I wanted to send you a quick note. This year's election marked a milestone for Latino voters, especially those who chose to vote Republican. For many, it was their first time registered as a GOP voter, and like you, I'm disappointed it wasn't enough to deliver the Red Wave as hoped. But we have a choice to make - **sulk ... or do something about it.** Well, our organization is doing something about it! Herschel saw a huge turnout of support from the Latino voters in Georgia and we need to make sure they vote for the GOP candidate on December 6th! **[Help us turn out the Latino voters for Herschel with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927621:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "Help us turn out the Latino voters for Herschel with your $25, $50,
or $100 donation today!")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927621:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "Sign")Latinos for America First is all-in for the Georgia runoff!
* We're putting volunteers on the ground to walk Latino neighborhoods. In fact, we've already knocked over 1,000 doors!
* We're buying digital ads that target Georgia's Latino voters and are looking to place ads on the local Hispanic stations as well.
* Most importantly, we're ramping up our Get-Out-The-Vote program to make sure these Latino voters show up to vote for Herschel on December 6th!

**All of this takes money ... and money that we don't have.** $76,276.87 to be exact if we're going to have any chance to fully fund our run-off program **We saw how our efforts in the Latino communities made an impact for GOP candidates across the country. Even President Trump remarked in his 2024 campaign announcement of the huge gains the GOP made in the Latino community during this election.** These efforts take money and if we're going to turn out the Latino voters for Herschel on December 6th, we need to have your support NOW. **[Will you help us today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927621:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "Will you help us today?")** | | [CHIP IN $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927622:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "CHIP IN $50")
---
| [CHIP IN $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927623:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "CHIP IN $100")
---
| [CHIP IN $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927624:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "CHIP IN $250")
---
So much is at stake--it's a national emergency. We can't let the Democrats gain the majority in the Senate and continue to push for abortion-on-demand, same-sex marriage, defunding the police, or continuing their socialist economic policies that caused inflation and high interest rates.
Help us push Herschel to victory by making sure the Latino voters show up and vote Red. **[Donate today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927621:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "Donate today!")**
For America,
Bianca Gracia
Founder
Latinos for America First PAC
| [SUPPORT HERSCHEL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61927621:6X-P8yGNH:m:1:3331703221:225A84AC4414552F428C6C5240A33262:r "SUPPORT HERSCHEL")
---
