name: Your America
subject: INFLATION AVALANCHE AHEAD – You ain’t seen nothing yet.
body:
They’ve been running the printing press full speed since the massive bailouts of 2009! Then came TARP and Quantitative Easing with mountains of newly created money. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6465%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=rAlkzDU%2b3tX35BkBPi5BBg&sysid=1)
Dear Friend,
They’ve been running the printing press full speed since the massive bailouts of 2009!
Then came TARP and Quantitative Easing with mountains of newly created money.
Finally, COVID-19 lockdowns brought round after round of stimulus checks to Main Street.
All created from thin air.
Every one of those newly created dollars devalues the dollars in YOUR pocket that YOU worked so hard for.
At last, the avalanche of inflation is crashing down upon us. Jamie Dimon of JP Morgan Chase is calling it an ECONOMIC HURRICANE.
Give us a call today at **1-800-656-6091** and be sure to ask for your **_FREE WEALTH PROTECTION GUIDE!_**
What else is causing this hurricane for Americans?
Central banks around the world are beginning to shun the dollar.
Powerful countries are exploring ways to de-dollarize and set up competing reserve currencies.
More cheap dollars at home and less demand abroad means there is nowhere left for all those dollars to go.
Our supply chains remain struggling and broken.
As our dollars chase fewer and fewer goods here at home, your prices could continue to SKYROCKET.
America’s inflation nightmare is here - and so far its not transitory. A potentially **devastating spike** is ahead that could greatly **damage your savings** and your standard of living.
**But GOLD is unprintable!_GET YOUR FREE[WEALTH PROTECTION GUIDE](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83255%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4GN%2f0tZ1h%2bqwYr6BsnRm7g&sysid=1)_**
In just a few minutes, you can position your portfolio in a way that could keep your money protected and growing in the uncertain times ahead. And, we’ll help you understand how you could use your IRA or 401k to help make this happen.
Call today at **1-800-656-6091**. We look forward to speaking with you soon. Click here to **_[RECEIVE YOUR FREE WEALTH PROTECTION GUIDE](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83256%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uhA%2bOzgI06In1m0JH1qoWg&sysid=1)_**.
**P.S.**

Download our brochure today and get up to $15,000 in **BONUS coins!** (subject to purchase amount) Furthermore, Feel secure with an industry leading **24-hour RISK FREE** investment.
Sincerely,
Lear Capital

More cheap dollars at home and less demand abroad means there is nowhere left for all those dollars to go. Our supply chains remain struggling and broken. As our dollars chase fewer and fewer goods here at home, your prices could continue to SKYROCKET. America’s inflation nightmare is here - and so far its not transitory. A potentially devastating spike is ahead that could greatly damage your savings and your standard of living. But GOLD is unprintable!GET YOUR FREE In just a few minutes, you can position your portfolio in a way that could keep your money protected and growing in the uncertain times ahead. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. And today I need your help. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7585%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=QyQ19gegL6whtyy4JUtAzA&sysid=1)
|
---
| | Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn.** And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court’s decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I’d like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/sign-pro-life-statement/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77257%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W4OPA%2bY15e6vHdE72eWxXg&sysid=1)**

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left’s anti-life ideology. [**Will you take one minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77258%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Edgw8TI%2fBqpRbR%2bXXlqwdQ&sysid=1)

I’d like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year. Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

Herschel Walker's radical opponent spent $70 MILLION in attack ads against him in the General Election, and now he's planning to launch another $6.5 MILLION ad blitz to smear Herschel before the runoff. | | | "SAVE HERSCHEL WALKER HERE" Herschel's opponent has the backing of Joe Biden, Barack Obama, and the entire Democrat establishment. The worst part about all of this is that their plan is working. I hate to bother you like this, but Herschel Walker's race will determine whether or not Democrats expand their majority AND THEIR POWER in the Senate. "I’m pleading with you, even if it’s $14, can you give today to help Herschel?" | | | "DONATE $14" This is the final sprint of the 2022 Election. body:
Hello!
First of all...
Thank you so much for all the incredible support you've shown for our Conservative movement. It's because of Patriots like you we won back control of the House, broke up united Democrat control of Washington, and built a Republican FIREWALL in Congress.
_None of this would be possible without your hard work._
Now that we're back in charge, top Republicans like our next Majority Leader, Steve Scalise, want to make 100% sure he knows what your top priorities are heading into the new year. He wants to fight for what's important to you -- that's why I'm personally reaching out.
[**If there 's anything we're missing in our priorities list, PLEASE make sure to add your answer in:**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926181:JYpz6yGNE:m:1:3373497171:7EBB880A06153EBF54945F497261A709:r)
**🇺🇸 2023 GOP PRIORITIES 🇺🇸**
**SECURE OUR BORDER
ROOT OUT PARTISAN BIAS IN THE FBI
EXPOSE DEMOCRAT CORRUPTION
PRESERVE THE LIVES OF UNBORN CHILDREN
DEFEND RELIGIOUS LIBERTY
STOP CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN OUR SCHOOLS
LOWER TAXES FOR THE AMERICAN PEOPLE
REBUILD AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE
DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY **
**[ENDORSE THIS LIST OF PRIORITIES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926181:JYpz6yGNE:m:1:3373497171:7EBB880A06153EBF54945F497261A709:r)**
**[ADD ANOTHER ANSWER](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926181:JYpz6yGNE:m:1:3373497171:7EBB880A06153EBF54945F497261A709:r)**
**If you don 't see your top priority listed, [please let GOP leaders know right here and right now!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926181:JYpz6yGNE:m:1:3373497171:7EBB880A06153EBF54945F497261A709:r)**
**If you agree with these top priorities,[please endorse this list of endorsements here!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61926181:JYpz6yGNE:m:1:3373497171:7EBB880A06153EBF54945F497261A709:r)**
We need your feedback before GOP leaders meet at 9:00 AM (EST) tomorrow. We value your feedback because we know our network of grassroots supporters is the lifeblood of our Conservative movement. _We can 't save America without you! _
Thank you,
Sarah
Republican HQ

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: You can't be trusted..
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929747:J3M46yG-N:m:1:3360412034:ECA7A5A397FF683B9CCF405F023AF7D3:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929747:J3M46yG-N:m:1:3360412034:ECA7A5A397FF683B9CCF405F023AF7D3:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929747:J3M46yG-N:m:1:3360412034:ECA7A5A397FF683B9CCF405F023AF7D3:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929747:J3M46yG-N:m:1:3360412034:ECA7A5A397FF683B9CCF405F023AF7D3:r)** ** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929747:J3M46yG-N:m:1:3360412034:ECA7A5A397FF683B9CCF405F023AF7D3:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929747:J3M46yG-N:m:1:3360412034:ECA7A5A397FF683B9CCF405F023AF7D3:r)
---
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929747:J3M46yG-N:m:1:3360412034:ECA7A5A397FF683B9CCF405F023AF7D3:r)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: The Battle for Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
We can’t afford to lose in Georgia.

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3kf3l4cnag6f4q1r89nm29s0r8nf9mh4ajd9d60_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im4pr4c1h2bs)
---

We can't afford to lose in Georgia.

With Democrats already having 50 Democrat senators, it is absolutely _**CRITICAL**_ that Republicans bounce back with a _**BIG**_ win for Herschel Walker to make it that much harder for them to push through their radical agenda.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd4jr3jjtksuclh8rgle2im3t1seqm8m259c5dv8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im4pr4c1h2bs)
---

**Make no mistake:_Herschel is the underdog in this fight._** He finished behind his far-left opponent in the first round and is being vastly outraised by big money Democrats.

name: Vice President Mike Pence
subject: What I’m Thankful for This Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929795:JtgR6yGNB:m:1:3361486117:61A076B403D5D3ED817F394A28D7ADA6:r)
---

This Thanksgiving season, we are especially grateful to our men and women serving our country. They give it their all so we here at home can have it all.

We have so much to be thankful for as Americans:

The freedom to worship our God.
The ability to protect our families and our homes.
And waking up in the greatest country that's ever existed.

These blessings are sadly taken for granted these days with _**[many going as far as to wish them away.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929795:JtgR6yGNB:m:1:3361486117:61A076B403D5D3ED817F394A28D7ADA6:r "many going as far as to wish them away.")**_

I will never waiver in my commitment to the American people. I will fight until my last breath for the freedoms that have made this country the greatest.

_**[I started Advancing American Freedom to help see this mission through. Will you stand with me and our American brothers and sisters as we work tirelessly to preserve our unique American liberties.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929795:JtgR6yGNB:m:1:3361486117:61A076B403D5D3ED817F394A28D7ADA6:r "I started Advancing
American Freedom to help see this mission through. Will you stand with me and our American brothers and sisters as we work tirelessly to preserve our
unique American liberties.")**_

name: Team Veronica
subject: The power of our community →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/VE_Logo_Web.png]
Friend, when we call ourselves a grassroots campaign, we mean it.

Our roots in El Paso run deep. Veronica is a third-generation El Pasoan, and she's spent decades fighting for her hometown as a public servant.

We're not funded by corporate dark money or national special interest groups. We fight for El Paso, we're accountable to El Pasoans, and we're powered by real people giving a few dollars and a few hours at a time.

And these are the results, friend. We are so proud of what our community has accomplished.

*
Registered
over
3,000
new
voters
*
Sent
248,274
text
messages
*
Knocked
thousands
of
doors
*
Delivered
1000+
yard
signs
*
Sent
more
than
8,000
vote-by-mail
applications
to
El
Paso
seniors
*
Turned
out
over
165,000
El
Paso
voters,
second
only
to
the
record-breaking
2018
midterm
elections
*
Elected
champions
for
the
borderlands
and
working
people
everywhere

We couldn't have done it without your support, friend. Thank you so much for being part of this team.

- Team Veronica
Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica?

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.** My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: [**Please, friend, will you chip in $15 or more right now to split between me and Serve America so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54924915/380049405/-392698372?refcode=20221121_SAP_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDYwNTAyMC1jODY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhD1FUSS0C6rT9Y3ubnrtUAkOMjKPjuJ4mqdNAK4Fzc=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54924919/380049410/-392698372?refcode=20221121_SAP_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDYwNTAyMC1jODY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhD1FUSS0C6rT9Y3ubnrtUAkOMjKPjuJ4mqdNAK4Fzc=)** I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress. **They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. name: Dick Durbin
subject: 51 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I know we can do this.
#
Peter,
I want to thank each and every one of you again for all your hard work during this election. We kept Illinois blue, flipped red seats, and defended our 50-vote Democratic Senate majority.
Now, we have another big task ahead of us on December 6 when my friend Senator Raphael Warnock faces a runoff election in Georgia. If he wins, he will become Democrats’ 51st vote.
**[I know we can do this. Donate now to re-elect Senator Warnock and expand our majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54925386/380051210/-763014397?refcode=dd_em_221121_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTc5OGM3Ny1jOTY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pR899hNUxpD9lCAEZFTMhaDG8RnfCtKh_6aJ_YNg2bY=)**
Pundits and poll watchers were quick to count Democrats out this cycle. But the voters have delivered us a Democratic Senate — a crucial check on the incoming Republican-led House.
With 51 Democrats, we can be even more effective at stopping the GOP’s hyper-partisan antics and focusing instead on passing legislation, confirming judges, and the other work ahead of us.
But the race in Georgia is extremely close — and if we come up short, Republicans will replace Senator Warnock with a candidate who has no business serving in the United States Senate.
**[Senator Warnock is counting on us, Peter. Can you make a contribution — whatever you can spare — to help Democrats hold this seat in Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54925387/380051211/-763014397?refcode=dd_em_221121_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTc5OGM3Ny1jOTY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pR899hNUxpD9lCAEZFTMhaDG8RnfCtKh_6aJ_YNg2bY=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: I know we can do this. Peter, I want to thank each and every one of you again for all your hard work during this election. We kept Illinois blue, flipped red seats, and defended our 50-vote Democratic Senate majority. Now, we have another big task ahead of us on December 6 when my friend Senator Raphael Warnock faces a runoff election in Georgia. If he wins, he will become Democrats’ 51st vote. = Pundits and poll watchers were quick to count Democrats out this cycle. But the voters have delivered us a Democratic Senate — a crucial check on the incoming Republican-led House. With 51 Democrats, we can be even more effective at stopping the GOP’s hyper-partisan antics and focusing instead on passing legislation, confirming judges, and the other work ahead of us. But the race in Georgia is extremely close — and if we come up short, Republicans will replace Senator Warnock with a candidate who has no business serving in the United States Senate. = My best, Dick Durbin ** ****=**** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziejgu2dbb0v7ecf283potb48f8o6h5m0i1fhvi0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imcor6cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsmkpbutschj9brl94hr02b9kgrakgr53gpfgc9o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imcor6cph2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziiorr3mvdjqndbin0t4rbhele830ucsinfg5748_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imcor6cph2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7n3nqg1pdd13o2tf0vfq6f3mja9gtkc4ksed8fg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imcor6cph2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr7f1anuvu8g5de5ld1f6ii3f4vutjsu6p0sap1o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imcor6cph2bs)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoe321ciug2tvekvn3arktll95jend845qvo6kso_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob5chh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp2pq2nej3r4bih9o3sek2d1eal3c651m6o6ht20_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob5chh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6pc0m2esajsk5g2op4pl5b3j939gm25eph15fi8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob5chh2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7oc86qcsstpu2r0rv4i72mpco1an8l8ne948tu0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob5chh2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp093u6uqc5qgtj8ku8q15qk9eaufnreqb8d2800_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0ob5chh2bs)

---

name: David Horowitz
subject: The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers
body:
If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood eli
| | | Dear friend,If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood elite.For all their glamorous parading on red carpets, and their self-righteous posturing about social justice, Tinseltown is teeming with _permanently damaged children_ , _spoiled brats_ , and _liberal degenerates_. I’m sick and tired of these virtue-signaling narcissists being given a megaphone by the mainstream media who ask _no questions_ about their blatant hatemongering._So, I came up with a solution:_
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z81nee6hkkgg14s3ubbufmtc82drkj6fctrv103g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq2d1jeiojb85nm9rret5hebqq6cjl6kojfddlkoqj7cbl69rqccb46hh62cb168ojcd9h6jh3ad70s9h6adv5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls88he5d2ak9p69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf52m9iasblmvb38ddgegqbectls9g64oj4chh68pui24bhfk8gicb1fk4ga1bt4l8jiv8585d1a59p3kti46h22sh2s8i66or4s1im0o36clh2bs)
---
Since these Hollywood liberals only care about filling their mansions with pointless awards and trophies, why don’t I give them the award they _truly_ deserve.**The distinguished honor of being one of the _20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_.** In fact, I even put this list in a new pamphlet the Freedom Center just published, and I want you to have a copy of it so you can read it for yourself. **[Friend, if you donate $10 or more to the Freedom Center today, I will you send you a complimentary copy of _The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_. ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuv9tq57a09qisl9dbrqn3ph01mcpa9eoqu8jomo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0o36clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt16gpn9c9lk2rr4ttneion5td369qjac9nmmqqcd9jm5qj4tt665i38oj165gj4c9m6koj9ohl6jge4oj56vin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu448n2mh5a4sj4lonbdulmkoj9dblmnihb4p5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4o32c9i68oj4cv9125onq48965gnq2850luiak9pfk2k2mgl2kshqep2bs)**
---
[**DONATE TO THE FREEDOM CENTER TODAY TO RECEIVE YOUR COMPLIMENTARY PAMPHLET**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za2m0m4gaaoqvni6cnq61vrc8l5lveej6b8317d8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0o36clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt16gpn9c9lk2rr4ttneion5td369qjac9nmmqqcd9jm5qj4tt665i38oj165gj4c9m6koj9ohl6jge4oj56vin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu448n2mh5a4sj4lonbdulmkoj9dblmnihb4p5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4o32c9i68oj4cv9125onq48965gnq2850luiak9pfk2k2mgl2kshqep2bs)
---
This pamphlet goes into detail about the vile, poisonous beliefs and actions of the Hollywood elite. From Jane Fonda to Kathy Griffin to Ron Pearlman and even to some that may surprise you.These elitist leftists need to be EXPOSED and not given a voice to spew their hatred of America. Here at the Freedom Center – headquartered in the liberal epicenter of Hollywood – we’re in Ground Zero fighting to end the reign of these Marxist elites who our society idolizes.Why are we taking this fight directly to the source? Well, let me briefly share with you my story.My name is David Horowitz. I’m committed to ending the reign of Marxist elites because 50 years ago... I _was _a Marxist.I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers – who the Hollywood Elite still idolize to this day. I edited Ramparts – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. **Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible.** So, I left.I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and dedicated my life to exposing them.
---
[**DONATE TO THE FREEDOM CENTER TODAY TO RECEIVE YOUR COMPLIMENTARY PAMPHLET**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbq5gea7q19k5u0j3smn7n3obk0if47dq0bn8v90_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0o36clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt16gpn9c9lk2rr4ttneion5td369qjac9nmmqqcd9jm5qj4tt665i38oj165gj4c9m6koj9ohl6jge4oj56vin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu448n2mh5a4sj4lonbdulmkoj9dblmnihb4p5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4o32c9i68oj4cv9125onq48965gnq2850luiak9pfk2k2mgl2kshqep2bs)
---
I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, _we would lose our country forever._ And, to be frank with you, I simply can’t stand back and watch these coddled, Hollywood-bubble celebrities fantasize about Communism and Marxism and convince our young people it’s the way of the future. _Communism is nothing but a lie_. And it’s ironic that the most wealthy and privileged in our society so desperately want to be ushered into Communistic poverty. That’s why myself and my Freedom Center are 100% dedicated to exposing these liberal elites and shining a light on how poisonous their beliefs really are. I want you to see for yourself just how vile this is. [**That’s why I will send you a complimentary copy of The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers when you give a $10 or more donation to my Freedom Center.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7jvbg3v2o7lncbtodpeeuq90tbmg691sfb3ft38_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1im0o36clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt16gpn9c9lk2rr4ttneion5td369qjac9nmmqqcd9jm5qj4tt665i38oj165gj4c9m6koj9ohl6jge4oj56vin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu448n2mh5a4sj4lonbdulmkoj9dblmnihb4p5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4o32c9i68oj4cv9125onq48965gnq2850luiak9pfk2k2mgl2kshqep2bs) Your $10 or more donation to the Freedom Center today won’t just secure yourself a complimentary copy of _The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_ , but it will be put to immediate use in our mission to expose Hollywood’s plan to destroy America and our free society.No longer will the elites get a “free pass” to be disgusting hatemongers. It’s time to expose them, hold them accountable, and take away their megaphones. Thank you for joining me and the Freedom Center in this mission!
---

clean_body: If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood eli | | | Dear friend,If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood elite.For all their glamorous parading on red carpets, and their self-righteous posturing about social justice, Tinseltown is teeming with permanently damaged children , spoiled brats , and liberal degenerates. I’m sick and tired of these virtue-signaling narcissists being given a megaphone by the mainstream media who ask no questions about their blatant hatemongering.So, I came up with a solution: Since these Hollywood liberals only care about filling their mansions with pointless awards and trophies, why don’t I give them the award they truly deserve.The distinguished honor of being one of the 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers. In fact, I even put this list in a new pamphlet the Freedom Center just published, and I want you to have a copy of it so you can read it for yourself. This pamphlet goes into detail about the vile, poisonous beliefs and actions of the Hollywood elite. From Jane Fonda to Kathy Griffin to Ron Pearlman and even to some that may surprise you.These elitist leftists need to be EXPOSED and not given a voice to spew their hatred of America. Here at the Freedom Center – headquartered in the liberal epicenter of Hollywood – we’re in Ground Zero fighting to end the reign of these Marxist elites who our society idolizes.Why are we taking this fight directly to the source? Well, let me briefly share with you my story.My name is David Horowitz. I’m committed to ending the reign of Marxist elites because 50 years ago... I was a Marxist.I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers – who the Hollywood Elite still idolize to this day. I edited Ramparts – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So, I left.I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. And, to be frank with you, I simply can’t stand back and watch these coddled, Hollywood-bubble celebrities fantasize about Communism and Marxism and convince our young people it’s the way of the future. Communism is nothing but a lie. And it’s ironic that the most wealthy and privileged in our society so desperately want to be ushered into Communistic poverty. That’s why myself and my Freedom Center are 100% dedicated to exposing these liberal elites and shining a light on how poisonous their beliefs really are. I want you to see for yourself just how vile this is. Your $10 or more donation to the Freedom Center today won’t just secure yourself a complimentary copy of The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers , but it will be put to immediate use in our mission to expose Hollywood’s plan to destroy America and our free society.No longer will the elites get a “free pass” to be disgusting hatemongers. It’s time to expose them, hold them accountable, and take away their megaphones. Thank you for joining me and the Freedom Center in this mission! Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. subject: Need your help to get this out

body:

---
Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeolgka06ddradgnavj9m70i4cju62vmnkksm200_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imeoj2c5h2bs)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4q0af237t2vp0rc0t969leb76vegcg4mpil5v28_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imeoj2c5h2bs)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmq6ebo7ousjq1a0voasaa52t30g5ovhjeos3kkg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imeoj2c5h2bs)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdcrnqdfhk2n845coo87687ctuv0aqgs3bomg138_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imeoj2c5h2bs)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlvv367phtdcost2u78cj4tq3gnrfjuq9a0tq0r8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1imeoj2c5h2bs)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s all going to come down to turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929954:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929954:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929954:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929954:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929954:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929954:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929954:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929955:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929956:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929957:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929958:JBDCAyGNC:m:1:3253819041:BC3447CF5A05889DB19D32F3EE725320:r)

name: R. Warnock
subject: together, we will prevail in our critical fights for justice to win this race and continue making progress for our nation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Hey friend – I can’t believe how far we’ve come together.
Just last year, we shocked all the pundits and naysayers when we flipped Georgia blue and took back the Senate for Democrats. **And I can honestly say, none of the progress we've made since would have been possible without you, friend.**
**Together,** we shocked the pundits and the naysayers by flipping Georgia and the Senate blue last year.

**Together** , we built a massive multiracial coalition of conscience – that is determined to create a better, brighter future for all.

**And together, we will prevail in our critical fights for justice to win this race and continue making progress for our nation.**
But here’s the thing: Experts at _Politico_ say that winning this race will all come down whether or not we raise enough resources. With GOP donors flooding Herschel Walker's campaign with over $37 million to defeat us, I need an immediate surge of grassroots support to fight back and win.
**That’s why, with only 15 days left in this runoff, I hope you'll stand together with me one more time to help us raise the funds we need to power this campaign to victory. [So please friend, can I count on your contribution of $5 today to help us defeat Herschel Walker, win this race, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54896174/379985002/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5129-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBiNzNjZC1hNDY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_kFC0xx0Zd2Kq-x1IHC2_ICjVMyamnYNs1CnpCYgXg=)**

**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

clean_body: | | | Hey friend – I can’t believe how far we’ve come together. Just last year, we shocked all the pundits and naysayers when we flipped Georgia blue and took back the Senate for Democrats. And I can honestly say, none of the progress we've made since would have been possible without you, friend. Together, we shocked the pundits and the naysayers by flipping Georgia and the Senate blue last year. Together , we built a massive multiracial coalition of conscience – that is determined to create a better, brighter future for all. And together, we will prevail in our critical fights for justice to win this race and continue making progress for our nation. But here’s the thing: Experts at Politico say that winning this race will all come down whether or not we raise enough resources. With GOP donors flooding Herschel Walker's campaign with over $37 million to defeat us, I need an immediate surge of grassroots support to fight back and win. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5419%2E878179%2E3vsJKK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5419%2E878179%2E3vsJKK).**

name: Team Cammack
subject: You helped elect some of America’s strongest leaders
body:
You helped elect some of America's strongest leaders who will fight to restore our Conservative values in Congress!
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QA3x7zfyyUXVPN1uwkbpCqCDYhqOdHuHmy5a2b89TidJZQawziDpZtrkx8SzmmUj33gh0ZOieUWXjKtD0yu0UBZU86URVoupwK-n1UwloOiA42Q6zSytWBd6iEI-nrbs9Ofj1Y9hINDZoDF-0Riaxxa_D5yietaywpvBmCw8mR3-b2rAcJcESSXG--nEhBdcL_pd2IkYuxO41xpIsUgtS88AaET1ERllnPYQTTbHkDY=&c=qiwMg7ITouVPKzeSIIEIYCQ2cUPTENLbYYB-MG9lliePGmP-SJfQPg==&ch=2MfZHvy79_8YJ3e6bAdA-M2JFzgp4gI3TrRyDkCjA1UTU3l88MRKkg==)

| Friend
You helped elect some of America's strongest leaders who will fight to restore our Conservative values in Congress!
Here are some of the great wins Republicans won across the country:

* Mike Lawler (NY-17)
* Nick LaLota (NY-01)
* Anthony D'Esposito (NY-04)
* Jen Kiggans (VA-02)
* Monica de la Cruz (TX-15)
* Morgan Luttrell (TX-08)
* Russell Fry (SC-07)
* Zach Nunn in Iowa (IA-03)
* Eli Crane in Arizona (AZ- 02)
* Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06)

And, of course, some of the amazing Florida Republican wins:

* Aaron Bean (FL-04)
* Cory Mills (FL-07)
* Anna Paulina Luna (FL-13)
* Laurel Lee (FL-15)

Kat supported and helped these campaigns see victory! We've worked hard to ensure that Republicans took back the House, but now that the job is done, it's time to turn our attention to fixing the problems the Democrats put in place. We've got a lot of work that needs to be done with your continued support.
Friend we have to keep moving forward if we want to get America back on track. There is so much damage to undo, but the new RED House Majority is up for the challenge. They will pass legislation that will put our people, our economy, and our freedom First.
We have a lot to accomplish before our nation can take a breath of relief. [Stand with Kat and these conservative patriots as they fight for us!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QA3x7zfyyUXVPN1uwkbpCqCDYhqOdHuHmy5a2b89TidJZQawziDpZtrkx8SzmmUj33gh0ZOieUWXjKtD0yu0UBZU86URVoupwK-n1UwloOiA42Q6zSytWBd6iEI-nrbs9Ofj1Y9hINDZoDF-0Riaxxa_D5yietaywpvBmCw8mR3-b2rAcJcESSXG--nEhBdcL_pd2IkYuxO41xpIsUgtS88AaET1ERllnPYQTTbHkDY=&c=qiwMg7ITouVPKzeSIIEIYCQ2cUPTENLbYYB-MG9lliePGmP-SJfQPg==&ch=2MfZHvy79_8YJ3e6bAdA-M2JFzgp4gI3TrRyDkCjA1UTU3l88MRKkg==)

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Trump is coming back and we're getting ready.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
November 21, 2022
Dear friend,
The midterms are over and we're proud of the progressive wins here in Tennessee [https://www.instagram.com/p/CkutV_EstLJ/] and all across the country. Democrats kept control of the Senate. In Maryland, Wes Moore was elected as their first Black governor. Florida Democrat Maxwell Frost will become the first Gen Z member of Congress. Becca Balint will be the first woman and the first openly LGBTQ+ politician to represent Vermont in Congress. Gen Z turned out to vote in record numbers. [https://time.com/6232272/generation-z-voters-midterm-elections/]
We have a lot to celebrate but there's still work to do. Trump just announced his candidacy for President and republicans will no doubt be mobilizing to secure the Presidency and every seat they can.
Tennessee Voter Project is playing the long game. We'll continue to reach progressive voters, young voters, and encourage progressives throughout Tennessee to register to vote. With your help, we can cover a lot of ground in the next two years.
SUPPORT TVP AS WE PREPARE FOR THE 2023 AND 2024 ELECTIONS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
If you want to support TVP as we continue building a progressive base in Tennessee, please contribute what you can [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] . Your support is invaluable. We appreciate those of you who have helped us support progressive candidates, put out two television ads, and send out a mailer to West Tennessee to get out the vote. Let's keep it going.
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930025:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930025:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930025:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930026:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930027:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930028:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930029:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930030:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930031:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930032:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930025:J_Ck1yGNc:m:1:3317145305:9CA7D6E515E3F590058F83DEF4526A83:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.

We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: This is blatant government overreach!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-b7xfPpA)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty,Michael and Chantell Sackett have been fighting for 15 years to build a home on the private property they own near Priest Lake in Bonner County, Idaho. It's not for the usual reasons like a lack of building supplies or unresponsive contractors. It's because the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) declared that their land is a wetland. But here's the kicker. The Sacketts' land is not wet. There's no water on it!Still, the government is going after them. And if the couple doesn't comply with the EPA's outlandish regulations, they could face fines up to $32,500 _per day_!The Sacketts have been dragged through the courts for years fighting for their property rights-**and yours**. Now, their case will be argued before the U.S. Supreme Court. And MSLF has lent them support in their fight against this blatant government overreach.That's why I'm emailing you today with a special request. I'm hoping you will stand with the Sacketts and show them you support their fight by signing our petition today.If the EPA is allowed to trample the lives of private citizens like the Sacketts with no opposition, there's no telling who could be next.But your voice today will push back against this injustice and show the government that you stand for freedom and the private property rights of every American citizen. **Please sign the petition below declaring your desire to stand against this blatant overreach by the EPA.**
* I am standing for the private property rights of Michael and Chantell Sackett.
* I am standing against unelected bureaucracies that threaten the rights of individual citizens.
* I am asking the U.S. Supreme Court to rule against the EPA's blatant government overreach.

Please sign our petition right now at this secure link: **[https://mslegal.org/subscribe/sackett-petition/](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)** For Liberty!Cristen WohlgemuthPresident & CEOMountain States Legal Foundation
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzI1LWFkZDBlNzZjOTRlYzRiYWU5M2QyMzU3MmU5ZWEyNzg1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/2Hfn80Tw4mZciLQt6GQpYg) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Nov. 21st: The Dems could nuke the filibuster if we don’t win GA…
body:
| | | |
---
---
Right now, early voting in Georgia is set to begin on Sunday, November 27th, though Democrats are going to court to try to move the first day to Saturday, November 26th. The left is already out in full force in Georgia, and that is why we need your help immediately! We also need your feedback and input, so please fill out the short surveys included in this email.
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
America needs your urgent help with the Georgia Senate runoff election! We need help with poll watching and help with Get Out The Vote efforts. **Poll Watching** The deadline to get signed up and credentialed as a poll watcher is approaching _very_ fast, and there are so many positions to fill – for both early voting and Election Day! The great thing is there is NO residency requirement to poll watch! You can live somewhere else and still come to Georgia to poll watch! [**Sign up to poll watch today,**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._p-6Q) **so that we can get you credentialed in time.** **WE KNOW THAT THE LEFT DOES NOT WANT THIS RUNOFF SECURED –**[**PLEASE HELP US SECURE IT!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) **Get Out The Vote** While the Democrats will have control of the Senate with Kamala Harris’ tie-breaking vote, it is of the utmost importance that we do not allow them to take this extra seat. First, we need as many conservative votes as possible, and we need Georgia to be represented well in the Senate. Second, if the left wins this extra seat, they will not need Joe Manchin’s vote – and sometimes he is the only Democrat that stops their bad bills. If Raphael Warnock wins this seat, the Democrats will only need one more vote to be able to nuke the filibuster (which means they will pack the Supreme Court with extremists and pass every other radical left-wing, crazy idea)! We must win this sat to stop them from taking this country over the cliff, but we can’t do that [without your help](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to Get Out The Vote! **Text Voters** If you want to help but aren't able to work in Georgia, please take a few minutes to text Georgia voters and ask them to vote. That's it! **All you have to do to begin, is go to[tpp.me/textvoters](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMjUtZDJjNGY1YzdhNTA3NDE5ZjhlMzFmOGJhNjAyZDliYzUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHBwLm1lL3RleHR2b3RlcnM_bWlkPTQ2MTAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/rQE8o96iEB3viRqFHBD73A) and register.** You will be asked for your cell phone number, your name, and your email address. Then just click on the button that says “Start Texting!”
---
|
---
| | Child immigrants are [entering](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-VuugDmVHXjrw) the labor force at U.S. slaughterhouses, thanks to President Biden’s weak immigration policies. Federal investigators recently [revealed](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._VbJPM6_ddQ3UKw) that Packer Sanitation Services Inc. employed at least 31 immigrant children from 13 to 17 years of age in its meatpacking facilities. Several of the children responsible for cleaning powered equipment during overnight shifts in Nebraska and Minnesota sustained chemical burns and other injuries. Despite this knowledge, the Biden administration has continued to accept [three million migrants](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) from foreign countries. After [droves](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._uVaYOMzZzZqKA) of illegal immigrants took up residence in New York City, most New Yorkers now say they want the next Congress to put an end to its weak border policies. Nearly 58% of New Yorkers support efforts to secure the U.S.-Mexico border and deport illegal aliens already residing in the United States, [according to exit polling](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) by Zogby Analytics for the Federation for American Immigration Reform. Supporters of these reforms include 58% of non-college-educated voters, 62% of white voters and 52% of Hispanics. On the other hand, less than 11% of New Yorkers think Congress should give amnesty to illegal immigrants, an action [supported](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MTAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Tvx0lxeCeV4_Xqy3zG8yHA) by Democrats lawmakers.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMjUtZDJjNGY1YzdhNTA3NDE5ZjhlMzFmOGJhNjAyZDliYzUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9oZWxwYXR0aGVwb2xscy8_bWlkPTQ2MTAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/EKMm3cqb6b3M9Pnak-5Nzg)
---
# **Surveys – We need your feedback!**
---
As a grassroots organization, we must have your input and feedback to operate. These surveys are so very important, and we are grateful for the time you put into answering them! **Speaker of the House survey** [**Please let us know what you think**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MTAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/3aDxzeLyhrwbsAqVuPuiew) about the Speaker of the House election for the new Congress, as well as proposed rule changes from some of our allies in the House. **Your 2022 voting experience survey** We still want to hear from you about your voting experience this year, if you haven’t yet told us. [**Please fill out our short form**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMjUtZDJjNGY1YzdhNTA3NDE5ZjhlMzFmOGJhNjAyZDliYzUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9oZWxwYXR0aGVwb2xscy8_bWlkPTQ2MTAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/s0MBU29Qy0VN23VRq2Bs2w) to tell us how it went!
---
|
---
| | The American medical community [is touting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) its continued commitment to woke medicine, according to a new report by the Association of American Medical Colleges (AAMC). Titled “The Power of Collective Action: Assessing and Advancing Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Efforts at AAMC Medical Schools,” the report reveals self-audits from U.S. medical schools proclaiming their devotion to race-based political agendas in the classroom. Out of 101 medical schools in the report, 75% of them “advocate for policies and/or legislation at a local, state, or federal level related to its diversity, inclusion, and equity mission,” while 85% have actually rebranded themselves to signal their alignment with the Left’s “social justice” priorities. The AAMC keeps score of the schools to determine whether they adhere to the institution’s race-based worldview and incentivizes schools to be in 100% compliance with its goals. The AAMC is also known for releasing new teaching standards for medicine that require students to achieve “competencies” in “white privilege,” “anti-colonialism,” and “race as a social construct,” among other tenets of race-centric ideology.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._ApA)
---
Make sure you are subscribed and listening to our new [Innovation Race Podcast!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-0d0UdcOJILjxA) We explore the issues raised in the documentary in more detail and depth. Be sure to listen for fascinating and entertaining discussions that will also help you understand the fight that is brewing between America and China/Big Tech.
---
|
---
| | In September, President Biden [declared](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._ZgBAWQLOFmnkC86Iw) that “The pandemic is over” and his Covid-19 coordinator admits that the United States will not likely face a large surge of infections this winter. The Biden administration is nevertheless asking Congress for [$9.25 billion in additional Covid-19 funding](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MTAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/xw3-k8x-BUwv9__nIimkTw) for vaccines, treatments and tests. And this comes during the lame duck session, before Republicans take control of the House in January. If approved, don’t be surprised if Biden’s Covid-19 funding winds up in a black hole, where no accounting for the funds will ever be seen.

clean_body: | | | | Right now, early voting in Georgia is set to begin on Sunday, November 27th, though Democrats are going to court to try to move the first day to Saturday, November 26th. The left is already out in full force in Georgia, and that is why we need your help immediately! We also need your feedback and input, so please fill out the short surveys included in this email. | | | America needs your urgent help with the Georgia Senate runoff election! We need help with poll watching and help with Get Out The Vote efforts. Poll Watching The deadline to get signed up and credentialed as a poll watcher is approaching very fast, and there are so many positions to fill – for both early voting and Election Day! The great thing is there is NO residency requirement to poll watch! You can live somewhere else and still come to Georgia to poll watch! so that we can get you credentialed in time. WE KNOW THAT THE LEFT DOES NOT WANT THIS RUNOFF SECURED – Get Out The Vote While the Democrats will have control of the Senate with Kamala Harris’ tie-breaking vote, it is of the utmost importance that we do not allow them to take this extra seat. First, we need as many conservative votes as possible, and we need Georgia to be represented well in the Senate. Second, if the left wins this extra seat, they will not need Joe Manchin’s vote – and sometimes he is the only Democrat that stops their bad bills. If Raphael Warnock wins this seat, the Democrats will only need one more vote to be able to nuke the filibuster (which means they will pack the Supreme Court with extremists and pass every other radical left-wing, crazy idea)! We must win this sat to stop them from taking this country over the cliff, but we can’t do that to Get Out The Vote! Text Voters If you want to help but aren't able to work in Georgia, please take a few minutes to text Georgia voters and ask them to vote. That's it! All you have to do to begin, is go to and register. You will be asked for your cell phone number, your name, and your email address. Then just click on the button that says “Start Texting!” | | | Child immigrants are the labor force at U.S. slaughterhouses, thanks to President Biden’s weak immigration policies. Federal investigators recently that Packer Sanitation Services Inc. employed at least 31 immigrant children from 13 to 17 years of age in its meatpacking facilities. Several of the children responsible for cleaning powered equipment during overnight shifts in Nebraska and Minnesota sustained chemical burns and other injuries. Despite this knowledge, the Biden administration has continued to accept from foreign countries. After of illegal immigrants took up residence in New York City, most New Yorkers now say they want the next Congress to put an end to its weak border policies. Nearly 58% of New Yorkers support efforts to secure the U.S.-Mexico border and deport illegal aliens already residing in the United States, by Zogby Analytics for the Federation for American Immigration Reform. Supporters of these reforms include 58% of non-college-educated voters, 62% of white voters and 52% of Hispanics. On the other hand, less than 11% of New Yorkers think Congress should give amnesty to illegal immigrants, an action by Democrats lawmakers. | | | Surveys – We need your feedback! As a grassroots organization, we must have your input and feedback to operate. These surveys are so very important, and we are grateful for the time you put into answering them! Speaker of the House survey about the Speaker of the House election for the new Congress, as well as proposed rule changes from some of our allies in the House. Titled “The Power of Collective Action: Assessing and Advancing Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Efforts at AAMC Medical Schools,” the report reveals self-audits from U.S. medical schools proclaiming their devotion to race-based political agendas in the classroom. Out of 101 medical schools in the report, 75% of them “advocate for policies and/or legislation at a local, state, or federal level related to its diversity, inclusion, and equity mission,” while 85% have actually rebranded themselves to signal their alignment with the Left’s “social justice” priorities. The AAMC keeps score of the schools to determine whether they adhere to the institution’s race-based worldview and incentivizes schools to be in 100% compliance with its goals. The AAMC is also known for releasing new teaching standards for medicine that require students to achieve “competencies” in “white privilege,” “anti-colonialism,” and “race as a social construct,” among other tenets of race-centric ideology. | | | Make sure you are subscribed and listening to our new We explore the issues raised in the documentary in more detail and depth.
