| | Derek, Yesterday I was on Fox News to talk about the Senate advancing the Respect For Marriage Act – a critical bill for our LGBTQ+ community – which requires the government to recognize gay and interracial marriages in our country, finally ensuring every person’s marriage receives equal treatment under the law. This bill is a big deal. But I’m tired of hearing politicians like Ted Cruz spread lies about this historic legislation. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54927227/380059117/-1601100632?refcode=mw_em_221121_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM5ZGI1NS1kNTY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yBID33-sp1DWFTXOeIa1UWSQDUOTGjPcXHCYOiCMmc=) Let’s make one thing clear: Ted Cruz is 100% wrong. _[**Chip in $5 now to show anti-equality politicians that we have the LGBTQ+ community’s back in this crucial time.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54927228/380059118/-1601100632?refcode=mw_em_221121_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM5ZGI1NS1kNTY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yBID33-sp1DWFTXOeIa1UWSQDUOTGjPcXHCYOiCMmc=)_ The Respect for Marriage Act is designed to protect our LGBTQ+ community and finally give them the rights and freedoms they deserve. And amid continued violence against this community, we can’t afford not to call dangerous and misleading lies like these out. This bipartisan bill advanced in the Senate because it reflects what the vast majority of Americans want: To protect marriage equality for all while protecting religious freedoms. I’m proud to set the record straight and I’m going to do everything I can to call out lies about bills attempting to protect our LGBTQ+ community. _[**Pitch in now if you’re with me >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54927229/380059119/-1601100632?refcode=mw_em_221121_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM5ZGI1NS1kNTY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yBID33-sp1DWFTXOeIa1UWSQDUOTGjPcXHCYOiCMmc=)_ Thank you for your support, Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54927230/380059120/-1601100632?refcode=mw_em_221121_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM5ZGI1NS1kNTY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yBID33-sp1DWFTXOeIa1UWSQDUOTGjPcXHCYOiCMmc=)**

Early voting is the best time to turn out Democratic voters. It’s when working voters can find the best day and time for them to head to the polls. It’s when students have flexibility to get out and cast their ballot.

**_Early voting is when we win._**

clean_body: | | | Peter, we need to treat next Monday like Election Day. Here’s why: Early voting is the best time to turn out Democratic voters. It’s when working voters can find the best day and time for them to head to the polls. It’s when students have flexibility to get out and cast their ballot. Early voting is when we win. But that means we need to reach as many voters as possible before early voting starts – and that means we just have one week left. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We launched a one day donor drive today because we need as many grassroots supporters as possible chipping in, helping to re-elect Rev. Warnock. =_ Thank you, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

subject: Take our transition survey →

Hey there, As Wes and I work to transition into our new roles as your Governor and Lt. Governor of Maryland, we’re putting together a top-notch team in Annapolis and preparing to deliver for you on Day 1. **We’re proud to be carrying out an inclusive, dynamic transition process in which every person in Maryland is encouraged to participate. But we can’t do it without you!** That’s why I want to hear from you. What issues do you want to see our administration prioritize in the beginning of our term? What do you think our current governor did right, and what could be improved? **[We put together a super quick online survey to collect your feedback. Take our Transition Survey now to share your thoughts with me and Wes!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54901625/380007362/-1862194228?refcode=fl_email_su_20221121transitionsurvey_am_od30da_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGExYzA3Ni1hZDY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IMJ8mI-UUzDyGWbsaoyanJjZM2sL6IxoqDKUHthKC4=&emci=7aa1c076-ad69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=80a1c076-ad69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=24635485)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54901626/380007364/-1862194228?refcode=fl_email_su_20221121transitionsurvey_am_od30da_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGExYzA3Ni1hZDY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IMJ8mI-UUzDyGWbsaoyanJjZM2sL6IxoqDKUHthKC4=&emci=7aa1c076-ad69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=80a1c076-ad69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=24635485)

Thanks,
Aruna

Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Update on the count in California’s 22nd District, which could narrow the Republican majority and throw their caucus into chaos. It’s narrowing, but the prospects look good for Democratic candidate, Rudy Salas. Can you help support a fair count?
body:
Republicans in chaos?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te911f43f-4048-4aad-9197-6226ba3ff322/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **_UPDATE :_**** ** Republicans currently have 219 House seats--giving them a three-seat majority--yet, there are a few seats left, and we're in very good shape in most to all of them. _In CA-22, the news is really good. __Though Rudy Salas is currently slightly trailing his GOP opponent, The Washington Post election model predicts when all the votes are counted that Salsa will win! So let's secure this race for Rudy Salas by making sure EVERY VOTE IS COUNTED!!_ **[To do this, can you give $5, $10, $25 to Rudy Salas so he can pay staffers and lawyers--the watchdogs--for this effort? Let's take another seat, keep the GOP majority so small they remain in chaos and have an even better Thanksgiving!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te397fbdd-1299-4477-a70e-5250d9860029/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_THANK YOU!_**
**_Cliff_** On Sun, Nov 20, 2022 at 10:28 PM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **WE HAVE A FEW RACES LEFT THAT WE MUST DELIVER** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6685186-125e-43fc-a406-71efe5b0bc57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Republicans are now expected to have a 5-7 vote edge in the House. Two of those votes, lunatics Andy Biggs & Matt Gaetz, have promised to will NEVER vote for Kevin McCarthy as leader. 31 voted for Biggs over McCartthy in a leadership contest. And Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, who is one of the more normal Republicans, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats if McCarthy doesn't have the votes._** **__This all adds up to something simple: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.__** **_One of the races still outstanding is California's 22nd Congressional District, a seat long held by Democrats, but taken over in 2020 by Republican David Valadao. Democrat Rudy Salas is currently within 4,000 votes with an entire 25% of the vote left to count. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-22 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7bba7898-6684-4338-a75f-195c828ff895/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We must ensure Salas has the funds for staff & lawyers for what might be another week or two, so every vote is counted, we can take this seat and make it less likely there is a Speaker McCarthy, and more likely a power sharing arrangement that ensures the issues we care about don't get buried._** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86fd318d-d011-477b-8234-5c8068468ce1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you to all the members of the Blue Amp Action Community who keep showing they intend to take every seat we can._** **_Cliff_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Donate Now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2895d80b-6aea-488b-8c02-85f364bbd383/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08c85232-9171-4f73-9318-492ace32069a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m getting concerned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929802:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929802:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929802:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929802:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929802:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929802:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929802:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929803:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929804:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929805:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929806:6-9HmyGNq:m:1:3361486117:7CF996605420F601612497565423C683:r)

---

We can't afford to lose in Georgia.

With Democrats already having 50 Democrat senators, it is absolutely _**CRITICAL**_ that Republicans bounce back with a _**BIG**_ win for Herschel Walker to make it that much harder for them to push through their radical agenda.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbfhp1dlciupl1kjqd91bfa3lio7529kcabe1s6g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hm0o70slh2bs)
---

**Make no mistake:_Herschel is the underdog in this fight._** He finished behind his far-left opponent in the first round and is being vastly outraised by big money Democrats.

If Herschel is going to have a shot at flipping Georgia **RED** and securing victory, he's going to need your support!

---
| | [FLIP GEORGIA RED](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq3ph65jtot8vmcgt8927gstrk592j5pj957gaqo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hm0o70slh2bs)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl8qjdno4ualj0128vte47c18asvjbkasfhdkuv0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hm0o72cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zav464jj3kc8nha1si02pc9qpnc9t9h4aapuc09o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hm0o72cph2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdp9u761kt5lup65ehmmrdetso88fl12dqt49aq8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hm0o72cph2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z61bbdavu9av17g5ev3bad46hhmfb5u01p4ngp6o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hm0o72cph2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgnfog9jmn1imbipgt5bnvav0smh0k9t73s0pbmo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hm0o72cph2bs)

---

name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Look at the damage Biden caused
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931107:JZUmyyGN3:m:1:3364136623:38FD3DF4988B05A5C900D52E9C6F6415:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931107:JZUmyyGN3:m:1:3364136623:38FD3DF4988B05A5C900D52E9C6F6415:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931083:JgPvyyGNh:m:1:3331703221:2D3B8F64FAB101B32310FA3D1D77C25A:r)

Peter,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. We rely on input from real firearm owners like YOU, Peter, which is why I am asking you to complete the **Official Gun Registration Survey** IMMEDIATELY.

**[Take the OFFICIAL GUN REGISTRATION SURVEY to tell the NRA how we can best protect your Second Amendment rights.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931083:JgPvyyGNh:m:1:3331703221:2D3B8F64FAB101B32310FA3D1D77C25A:r)**

Your personalized link to take the survey expires SOON. Our team is counting on you to answer the questions openly and honestly, Peter.

**[Use this personalized link to tell the NRA how we can best protect your right to keep and bear arms.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931083:JgPvyyGNh:m:1:3331703221:2D3B8F64FAB101B32310FA3D1D77C25A:r)**

clean_body: Take the survey before it's too late | The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation. Peter, The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation. Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough. Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. We rely on input from real firearm owners like YOU, Peter, which is why I am asking you to complete the Official Gun Registration Survey IMMEDIATELY. Peter, filling out the Official Gun Registration Survey only takes a few minutes. It 's the best way to help the NRA protect your gun rights and stop government overreach. Your personalized link to take the survey expires SOON. Our team is counting on you to answer the questions openly and honestly, Peter. subject: He now has 900 campaign staff

body:

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924628:6t2ACyGHN:m:1:3345639852:395E5F469DD5AA393DD8F9D2C21CEBCF:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924628:6t2ACyGHN:m:1:3345639852:395E5F469DD5AA393DD8F9D2C21CEBCF:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924628:6t2ACyGHN:m:1:3345639852:395E5F469DD5AA393DD8F9D2C21CEBCF:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924628:6t2ACyGHN:m:1:3345639852:395E5F469DD5AA393DD8F9D2C21CEBCF:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61924628:6t2ACyGHN:m:1:3345639852:395E5F469DD5AA393DD8F9D2C21CEBCF:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Gratitude for your hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54928845/380068645/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQxOTZhZC1kZTY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tPEol4oPVg1fTNuQ870RdowHryDuxs2oFSD-IjNIpc=&emci=4919012c-d669-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=714196ad-de69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=9494239)

| | Last week, Congress came back into session for the first time since the election. The Capitol was buzzing with the energy of our newly-elected colleagues, like Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, and those who won hard-fought races, like Rep. Kim Schrier and Sen. Patty Murray. **So, let me start by thanking you once again for all your hard work and dedication in returning me to Congress, helping Patty, Kim and Marie – and so many others across the country – get across the finish line.** It appears that the Republicans will take control of the House of Representatives, by a very, very narrow margin. That means that we are going to face an unending series of votes on bills that run counter to our Democratic values. I am not afraid to vote no. But I will also never stop looking for opportunities to work across the aisle to get things done and make life better for Washingtonians and _ALL_ Americans. _One more thing:_ After twenty years, Nancy Pelosi is stepping aside as our Democratic leader. She has been one of the most effective legislative leaders in American history. It has been an honor and a privilege to join her in guaranteeing affordable health care for millions of Americans, providing relief to working families through recessions and the pandemic, and making historic investments to rebuild America and tackle climate change. In this season of thanksgiving, I offer you my deepest gratitude and appreciation. Thank you, for all that you do. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | Friend,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m getting concerned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930191:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930191:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930191:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930191:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930191:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930191:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930191:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930192:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930193:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930194:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930195:JqbnCyGNH:m:1:3373497171:655F44AC61F4AFA251547F84349B5242:r)

body:
Hello, Peter!
First of all...
Thank you so much for all the incredible support you've shown for our Conservative movement. It's because of Patriots like you we won back control of the House, broke up united Democrat control of Washington, and built a Republican FIREWALL in Congress.
_None of this would be possible without your hard work._
Now that we're back in charge, top Republicans like our next Majority Leader, Steve Scalise, want to make 100% sure he knows what your top priorities are heading into the new year. He wants to fight for what's important to you -- that's why I'm personally reaching out.
[**If there 's anything we're missing in our priorities list, PLEASE make sure to add your answer in:**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929109:JO9tCyGNu:m:1:3350876382:06453CC9275F1DC82B9EF4EA834B1133:r)
**🇺🇸 2023 GOP PRIORITIES 🇺🇸**
**SECURE OUR BORDER
ROOT OUT PARTISAN BIAS IN THE FBI
EXPOSE DEMOCRAT CORRUPTION
PRESERVE THE LIVES OF UNBORN CHILDREN
DEFEND RELIGIOUS LIBERTY
STOP CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN OUR SCHOOLS
LOWER TAXES FOR THE AMERICAN PEOPLE
REBUILD AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE
DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY **
**[ENDORSE THIS LIST OF PRIORITIES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929109:JO9tCyGNu:m:1:3350876382:06453CC9275F1DC82B9EF4EA834B1133:r)**
**[ADD ANOTHER ANSWER](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929109:JO9tCyGNu:m:1:3350876382:06453CC9275F1DC82B9EF4EA834B1133:r)**
**If you don 't see your top priority listed, [please let GOP leaders know right here and right now!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929109:JO9tCyGNu:m:1:3350876382:06453CC9275F1DC82B9EF4EA834B1133:r)**
**If you agree with these top priorities,[please endorse this list of endorsements here!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61929109:JO9tCyGNu:m:1:3350876382:06453CC9275F1DC82B9EF4EA834B1133:r)**
We need your feedback before GOP leaders meet at 9:00 AM (EST) tomorrow. We value your feedback because we know our network of grassroots supporters is the lifeblood of our Conservative movement. _We can 't save America without you! _
Thank you,
Sarah
Republican HQ

name: Fairness Project Campaigns Team
subject: SIGN ON: Tell the Mississippi state legislature to bring back ballot measures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
We know elections have consequences, and in Mississippi, the results include losing the ability to bypass the state legislature and place a measure on the ballot. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54906775/380025664/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjAwNTA2MS1iNjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGMotS_NXdpoH_Rkq2p4myAkUEekWMewYdLbXoTUhPc=&emci=20054467-5967-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=bb005061-b669-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) | Team, We know elections have consequences, and in Mississippi, the results include losing the ability to bypass the state legislature and place a measure on the ballot. **Today, Mississippi has the dubious distinction of being the only state in modern history to rescind the ballot measure process.** Mississippi voters are denied this fundamental right because of the actions of two elected bodies: the state legislature and the state supreme court. In 2021, the state supreme court ruled the ballot measure signature-gathering process in Mississippi unconstitutional. The court’s ruling came after voters approved a medical marijuana ballot measure in 2020. With its decision, the court invalidated the entire ballot measure process, thereby denying voters the right to place any measures on the ballot moving forward. Following the court’s decision, the majority-conservative state legislature stalled on passing new legislative language during its 2022 session to restore the ballot measure process. **The action by the state supreme court and the failure to act by the state legislature are attacks on direct democracy in Mississippi.** **Our team at the Fairness Project alongside local advocacy groups have been calling for state politicians to restore the fundamental right of direct democracy to Mississippi voters. We’re quietly optimistic that, in its 2023 session, the state legislature will reinstate ballot measures.** [**However, we can’t afford to let up. We need YOU to take two minutes and sign our petition to the Mississippi state legislature telling them to reinstate ballot measures in 2023. >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54906776/380025665/-806901574?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjAwNTA2MS1iNjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGMotS_NXdpoH_Rkq2p4myAkUEekWMewYdLbXoTUhPc=&emci=20054467-5967-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=bb005061-b669-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) [SIGN OUR MISSISSIPPI STATE LEGISLATURE PETITION HERE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54906777/380025666/-806901574?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjAwNTA2MS1iNjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGMotS_NXdpoH_Rkq2p4myAkUEekWMewYdLbXoTUhPc=&emci=20054467-5967-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=bb005061-b669-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) Thanks, team. — Fairness Project

clean_body: We know elections have consequences, and in Mississippi, the results include losing the ability to bypass the state legislature and place a measure on the ballot. | | Team, We know elections have consequences, and in Mississippi, the results include losing the ability to bypass the state legislature and place a measure on the ballot. Today, Mississippi has the dubious distinction of being the only state in modern history to rescind the ballot measure process. Mississippi voters are denied this fundamental right because of the actions of two elected bodies: the state legislature and the state supreme court. In 2021, the state supreme court ruled the ballot measure signature-gathering process in Mississippi unconstitutional. The court’s ruling came after voters approved a medical marijuana ballot measure in 2020. With its decision, the court invalidated the entire ballot measure process, thereby denying voters the right to place any measures on the ballot moving forward. Following the court’s decision, the majority-conservative state legislature stalled on passing new legislative language during its 2022 session to restore the ballot measure process. The action by the state supreme court and the failure to act by the state legislature are attacks on direct democracy in Mississippi. Our team at the Fairness Project alongside local advocacy groups have been calling for state politicians to restore the fundamental right of direct democracy to Mississippi voters. We’re quietly optimistic that, in its 2023 session, the state legislature will reinstate ballot measures. Thanks, team. — Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Team: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**
My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.
Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you chip in $3 or more right now to split between me and Mark Kelly so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221121-1-7&t=1&akid=4789%2E6688874%2EDv_iIi)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221121-1-7&t=2&akid=4789%2E6688874%2EDv_iIi)
I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.
**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever.**
[**So please, I'm personally asking: Will you split $3 or more between me and Mark Kelly to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221121-1-7&t=3&akid=4789%2E6688874%2EDv_iIi)
Thank you,
Reverend Warnock

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4789%2E6688874%2EDv_iIi).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuoiiu8joikmk4i43ufscjhspeufc07non9h3e9g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hmapj4cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7fecfk49dv49brpck48ju1a8g0jcjpfhs5ob4a0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hmapj4cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbj5n0ehmqpqtrj4l0a6rrg8rslm2leckilkuk40_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hmapj4cdh2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zakmu17uq0e6e8gcog1padpu15r5dnqma2e9ca0o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hmapj4cdh2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqs7rdpmglm658j4q5efnp3vdnnm96k8e0v12dn8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1hmapj4cdh2bs)

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1011&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

This Thanksgiving we are grateful for the solidarity of all our movement
allies here and around the world.

On Black Friday, Our Revolution is leading US protests as part of a global
day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay
for its climate damage.

Join us in coalition with 80 unions and organizations holding strikes and
rallies in 32 countries to fight back against Amazon squeezing every last
drop it can from people and the planet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8053?t=1012&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]FIND A BLACK FRIDAY ACTION NEAR YOU

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1013&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

Progressives won the 2022 midterms! Our movement fended off a red wave,
flipped a Senate seat, added 9 new progressives to the House, and grew our
power down-ballot.

Thanks to you, Our Revolution organizers and volunteers made more than 4M
voter contacts — 2M calls and texts — to make the difference in tight
races.

“You got the vote out, you got young people out,” US Rep. Ro Khanna said
on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8054?t=1014&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]National Organize-to-Win Call Monday. “Progressives can be very
proud.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1015&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

Ro said he is particularly proud of John Fetterman, “the resiliency he
showed — and he showed our message works and we held the Senate.”

As a progressive populist, Fetterman gained in every PA county — his
strongest gains in rural areas — won back red counties like Erie, which
voted Obama twice then Trump.

Running on healthcare for all, the union way of life, and raising wages —
Fetterman did better with independents than any other Dem Senate
candidate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1016&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

“This sends a clear message and roadmap that going into 2024 Democrats
must lean into the popularity of the progressive platform, not write it
off,” Joseph Geevarghese, Our Revolution Executive Director, told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8011?t=1017&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]The
Guardian.

Ro Khanna is taking that [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8055?t=1018&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]message on tour, laying out a new vision for
Democrats from economic patriotism to democracy reform to foreign policy.

“So many communities have been left out of economic revitalization, but we
have a 21st Century plan to reverse deindustrialization,” he said. “That
means investing in people.”

“Medicare for All is a patriotic investment, free public education helps
our economy,” Ro explained. “Housing costs are soaring because Wall Street
is buying up homes, gas prices go up while Big Oil makes record profits —
this is a production agenda and an agenda that serves the working class.”

“Many in the Washington bubble underestimate the American people and the
progressive economic agenda — and the two are more aligned than corporate
interests would have folks believe,” Our Revolution Comms Coordinator
Amanda Nichols told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8064?t=1019&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]TYT.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1020&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

GEORGIA RUNOFF!

Our Revolution is going all-in to make sure we re-elect Raphael Warnock,
secure the 51st vote in the Senate, and diminish the power of
obstructionists like Joe Manchin.

In 2020, our targeted voter outreach helped Sen. Warnock win his first
Georgia runoff, and we can be the margin of victory in this race.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1021&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

Our Revolution Phonebank Force made 2 million calls and texts in the
midterms, and we’re keeping the energy going for the Georgia Runoff.

Help us cut through the attack ads, make personal connections with voters,
and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all. Call shifts to start after
Thanksgiving.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8017?t=1022&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]CALL GEORGIA VOTERS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1023&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

out more than 150,000 progressive voters in the state!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8012?t=1024&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]DONATE TO OUR EMERGENCY GEORGIA FUND

“The House may not be in Democratic hands, but we’ve got a stronger
progressive block that will have an outsized influence on administration
policy,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8056?t=1026&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]Daily Beast.

“We’ll have progressives leading the push on the administration to use
executive action, regulatory authority, and appointment powers to push
progressive priorities,” Joseph said.

New Our Revolution-backed Congress members include: Greg Casar (TX-35),
Delia Ramirez (IL-3), Maxwell Frost (FL-10), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine
Crockett (TX-30), Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), Becca Balint (VT), Andrea
Salinas (OR-6), and Val Hoyle (OR-4).

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1029&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

Amazon is squeezing every last drop it can from workers, communities, and
the planet.

That’s why Our Revolution is leading actions on Black Friday as part of a
global day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay workers, pay taxes, and pay
for the climate.

We are proud to be in coalition with 80 unions and organizations holding
strikes and rallies against the corporate giant in 32 countries.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8053?t=1030&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]Join us in NYC, DC, Philadelphia, Bessemer AL, Detroit, St. Louis, and
many other US cities — in international solidarity with workers in
Bangladesh, Cambodia, the Philippines, Columbia, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1031&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

“This is a fight for environmental justice, worker justice, tax justice,
but also other struggles,” James Schneider of Progressive International
said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8054?t=1032&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]LIVE National Call Monday.

“In South Africa, the indigenous movement is standing up because Amazon
wants to bulldoze sacred land and rivers for its regional headquarters,”
James said.

We are workers and citizens divided by geography and our role in the
global economy, but we’re united to Make Amazon Pay fair wages, its taxes,
and for its impact on the planet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8053?t=1033&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]TAKE ACTION TO MAKE AMAZON PAY

DIRTY DEAL ROUND 2

In September, Our Revolution and our network of allies rallied to defeat
the Dirty Deal, which would fast-track fossil fuel projects and gut
frontline community protections.

Well, it’s rearing its ugly head again, and Alice Madden, Policy and
Political Director for Greenpeace, joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8054?t=1035&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]National Organizing Call
on Monday to stop it once more.

“Senator Manchin is still trying to fast-track approvals for oil, gas, and
coal projects,” Alice said. “This Dirty Deal would sacrifice lives, lock
communities into more pollution, silence local voices, and sabotage our
climate goals.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1036&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

Manchin aims to include the Dirty Deal in upcoming must-pass legislation —
and some in Democratic leadership have a mind to help him pass it.

“Manchin has already begun his maneuverings, and the bill has gotten even
worse,” Alice told us. “Failure is really not an option, We must work in
solidarity to amplify strong congressional and frontline opposition.”

In Round 1, Our Revolution members made thousands of calls to their
Members of Congress to leverage the power of the people. Can we count on
you to be ready for Round 2?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8058?t=1041&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]amplifying the demand for a fair contract, fair staffing, and the
living wages and benefits that all workers deserve.

Solidarity with Starbucks Workers United organizers in New Jersey and
across the country!

FIGHTING FOR ONE FAIR WAGE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1042&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

On Thursday, Our Revolution joined One Fair Wage for the Server for an
Hour event at the Hyattsville Busboys & Poets, where progressive Maryland
elected officials — including new Prince Geoge’s County Councilmember
Krystal Oriadha — served lunch.

“We are excited to work with One Fair Wage to eliminate the sub-minimum
wage,” said Our Revolution National Coordinator Hal Ginsberg. “The success
of passing Initiative 82 to end the practice in DC shows the power and
popularity of the movement.”

Among attendees were: Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph
Geevarghese, One Fair Wage President Saru Jarayaman, Our Revolution MD
co-founder Wala Blegay, and long-time Our Revolution MD member Danny
Schaible. Like Krystal, Wala is starting her first term on the Prince
George’s County Council, while Danny is a Hyattsville City Councilmember.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1043&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

Our Revolution joined 45 organizations in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8059?t=1044&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]urging Congress this week to
pass two popular, bipartisan antitrust bills to rein in Big Tech before
January.

The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act
would enable fair competition on tech platforms and app markets, giving
small businesses a fair shot and empowering citizens with more choice.

The bills are popular. In a recent poll, 77% of voters agreed Big Tech was
too powerful and 65% were more likely to support their representative if
they voted for more regulation.

Our Revolution NYPAN and progressive groups across New York are calling
for the removal and replacement of Jay Jacobs, who is not fit to serve as
Chair of the State Democratic Party.

“It’s time for Gov. Kathy Hochul to work with the party to elect a
focused, determined, unifying party leader,” our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8060?t=1047&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ]letter reads. “The
state party lost 4 winnable seats, giving the U.S. House to Republicans -
and the responsibility lies squarely with Jacobs.”

As chair, Jacobs has spent much of his time blaming progressives. But,
while NYPAN and our allies worked tirelessly to get out the vote in NY,
the party establishment was nowhere to be found.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1048&akid=3781%2E5885482%2E9m1Gvd ][IMG]

This is the same Jay Jacobs who supported disgraced ex-Gov. Cuomo, tried
to cancel the 2020 primary, and opposed Democratic primary winner India
Walton for Buffalo Mayor.

“I called for Jay Jacobs’ resignation a year ago and I still hold that
position,” US Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez said Wednesday. Last week, she
said NYPAN is well-organized and positioned to fill the leadership gap.

It is long past time to reform the NY State Democratic Party. But we must
begin with leadership. Only then can we forge ahead together.

Organizer Didier Jimenez [ ]spoke on the labor panel with ALU’s Christian Smalls and others about the state of unions and our fight to keep growing a resurgent labor movement in America. ★ ★ ★ STARBUCKS RED CUP REBELLION [ ][IMG] Our Revolution New Jersey rallied with striking Starbucks workers Thursday at Red Cup Rebellion actions. We stood with baristas in Montclair, Hopewell and Summit NJ, [ ]amplifying the demand for a fair contract, fair staffing, and the living wages and benefits that all workers deserve. Solidarity with Starbucks Workers United organizers in New Jersey and across the country! ★ ★ ★ FIGHTING FOR ONE FAIR WAGE [ ][IMG] On Thursday, Our Revolution joined One Fair Wage for the Server for an Hour event at the Hyattsville Busboys & Poets, where progressive Maryland elected officials — including new Prince Geoge’s County Councilmember Krystal Oriadha — served lunch. “We are excited to work with One Fair Wage to eliminate the sub-minimum wage,” said Our Revolution National Coordinator Hal Ginsberg. “The success of passing Initiative 82 to end the practice in DC shows the power and popularity of the movement.” Among attendees were: Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese, One Fair Wage President Saru Jarayaman, Our Revolution MD co-founder Wala Blegay, and long-time Our Revolution MD member Danny Schaible. Like Krystal, Wala is starting her first term on the Prince George’s County Council, while Danny is a Hyattsville City Councilmember. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution joined 45 organizations in [ ]urging Congress this week to pass two popular, bipartisan antitrust bills to rein in Big Tech before January. The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act would enable fair competition on tech platforms and app markets, giving small businesses a fair shot and empowering citizens with more choice. The bills are popular. In a recent poll, 77% of voters agreed Big Tech was too powerful and 65% were more likely to support their representative if they voted for more regulation. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution NYPAN and progressive groups across New York are calling for the removal and replacement of Jay Jacobs, who is not fit to serve as Chair of the State Democratic Party. “It’s time for Gov. Kathy Hochul to work with the party to elect a focused, determined, unifying party leader,” our [ ]letter reads. “The state party lost 4 winnable seats, giving the U.S. House to Republicans - and the responsibility lies squarely with Jacobs.” As chair, Jacobs has spent much of his time blaming progressives. But, while NYPAN and our allies worked tirelessly to get out the vote in NY, the party establishment was nowhere to be found. [ ][IMG] This is the same Jay Jacobs who supported disgraced ex-Gov. Cuomo, tried to cancel the 2020 primary, and opposed Democratic primary winner India Walton for Buffalo Mayor. “I called for Jay Jacobs’ resignation a year ago and I still hold that position,” US Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez said Wednesday. Last week, she said NYPAN is well-organized and positioned to fill the leadership gap. It is long past time to reform the NY State Democratic Party. But we must begin with leadership. Only then can we forge ahead together. [ ]JACOBS HAS TO GO! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] On Black Friday, Our Revolution is leading US protests as part of a global day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay for its climate damage. Join us in coalition with 80 unions and ally organizations holding strikes and rallies in 32 countries to fight back against Amazon squeezing every last drop it can from people and the planet. [ ]FIND AN ACTION NEAR YOU ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is going all-in to re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock in the Georgia Runoff. Help us out-organize the right-wing money and propaganda, turn out 150,000 progressive voters in Georgia, and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all. [ ]DONATE TO OUR GEORGIA RUNOFF FUND! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Phonebank Force made 2 million calls and texts to voters in the midterms and we’re keeping the energy going for the Georgia run-off election. Volunteer with us to help elect Senator Warnock, defeat Herschel Walker, and save the Senate! [ ]JOIN OUR CALL TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Celebrate this BIG WIN in PA by getting your Fetterman sticker in his iconic shorts and hoodie — while supplies last! [ ]GET YOUR STICKER NOW! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for just $5/mo. and get your official membership card. For $10, get our collectible sticker 6-pack — $15, get the stickers + a poster — $27, get both + a tote bag — $50, get it ALL + a T-shirt! [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

body:
In a race this close, every single grassroots contribution could make all the difference. | |
---
Rev. Warnock here -- I'm feeling good about our race, and I hope you are, too. Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State -- and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority. **But right now, we can’t afford to fall short of our fundraising goal.** The GOP has already poured millions into Georgia to try to flip this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. **In a race this close, every single grassroots contribution could make all the difference. Your contribution to my campaign could make a huge impact in our race.** **So please, Derek, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $10 or more now -- split between my campaign and the DNC -- to keep Georgia blue and elect Democrats nationwide?**

clean_body: In a race this close, every single grassroots contribution could make all the difference. | | Rev. Warnock here -- I'm feeling good about our race, and I hope you are, too. Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State -- and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority. But right now, we can’t afford to fall short of our fundraising goal. The GOP has already poured millions into Georgia to try to flip this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. In a race this close, every single grassroots contribution could make all the difference. Your contribution to my campaign could make a huge impact in our race. So please, Derek, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $10 or more now -- split between my campaign and the DNC -- to keep Georgia blue and elect Democrats nationwide? Thank you for all your support, Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Tony Evers
subject: recognize anyone in this picture?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, do you
recognize anyone in this picture?

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1915?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20221121_1_1&t=1001&akid=6114%2E1827488%2EfSojc7 ][IMG]
That’s Donald Trump shaking hands with Herschel Walker — who’s running
against Democratic incumbent Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia.

With only 15 days left until the runoff election and the latest poll
showing a tied race, Senator Warnock needs our help to defeat his
extremely unqualified Trump-backed opponent.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1915?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20221121_1_1&t=1002&akid=6114%2E1827488%2EfSojc7 ]Can you chip in to help re-elect Senator Warnock and support our work
to defend democracy? Time is running out, and as we know from experience,
any amount is a big help in a race this close!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will be split between Raphael Warnock and Tony Evers and processed immediately.

Dear Barrier To Entry PAC Supporters,

As the two of us (Eden & Megan) dive into post-election debriefs, we both feel an overwhelming sense of gratitude that we get to support candidates who we believe in so wholeheartedly and stand behind so fervently. And through our reflection, we remain acutely aware that none of this would be possible without you. **_Yes, you who is skimming this email, we are looking at you, friends: Thank you.

_** You have supported us and sustained us through every battle we faced this election season. We are absolutely struck by how powerful this community has become in such a short amount of time. Our candidates, our allies, and our team (you) have made an enormous impact in our very first election cycle, _which can be summed up in three words:_

**We stay winning.**

**_Here’s why:_** We crushed every single race we played in regardless of the outcome because we broke barriers and helped low-income, working-class people run for office. We stayed focused on our progressive values. We mobilized like-minded people to build a people-powered movement from the ground up. We dolled out tens of thousands of grassroots dollars to our candidates so they could run strong campaigns — and we did it all because of YOU.

You’ve stood by us and lifted up our candidates, whether you live near or far from some of these races. And you’ve demonstrated that you believe in the fundamental idea that drives our work: **_If injustice anywhere is injustice everywhere, then justice anywhere is justice everywhere._**

* It means that you don’t have to live in Ohio to fight for that 10 year old girl we sent to Indiana to get an abortion.
* It means that you don't have to live in South Dallas to want Jessica Mason to be the one leading the charge for a community that has long been forgotten.
* It means that you don’t have to live in Nevada to want to see the first openly transgender person elected as a statewide official there.

**_Justice is justice regardless of where it’s happening._** And because you believe in that principle with us and are in this fight for justice alongside us, you have helped us secure these historic Primary and General Election wins:

**_Mayor Peter Schwartzmann — Galesburg, IL_**
\- This was a major underdog upset, beating out an 8 year pro-Trump incumbent.

**_Mayor Ed Gainey — Pittsburgh, PA_**
\- This was a major underdog upset.

_**Commissioner Shenise Turner-Sloss — Dayton, Ohio**_
\- Shenise was the top vote-getter, beating out a slate of conservative Democrats.

_**District Leader Shaquana Boykin — Brooklyn, New York**_
\- Shaquana held her seat in a competitive re-election.

_**Jamie McLeod-Skinner — Bend, Oregon**_
\- Jamie beat entrenched incumbent member of Congress Kurt Schrader in what has been called the __biggest Primary upset in Oregon since 1994__ and the biggest upset in the house since 2016, a statistically more improbable win than AOC’s historic victory.

_**Judge-elect Angelina Jackson — Dayton, Ohio**_
\- Angie clinched a county-wide landslide victory against a self-funding Republican opponent while other Democrats running parallel to her lost.

Ultimately, this is why we are winning, and why we will keep winning — because YOU stepped up as an ally to those doing the work on the ground. Together, we flipped seats in underdog races that no one believed in, spanning every time zone across the country.

In the coming days, we’ll share information with you about our candidates — and the exciting opportunities that lie ahead for those individuals as well as our organization going forward.

Thank you again. Seriously.
**_\-- Eden & Megan
_** (Founder & Co-Founder of Barrier To Entry PAC)
[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=73c83265c0&e=007b353608)
* * *

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC** is proudly 100% women owned and operated — by women of color, queer women, progressive women — who are committed to achieving social change through inclusive public leadership. Our mission is to build a political space that reflects and works for ALL of us by helping pro-choice, lower income candidates run for office. Because it's time to elect actual working-class representatives to represent the working class. _******[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=6021269c77&e=007b353608)****_Pitch in today to break barriers with us! >>_**_ **______[DONATE →](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=245d73f2fa&e=007b353608)**

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93c3810746814eeb83586133f6cf9a5d&_e=6fQ9COrIbQyGya2pPZ4rFxHDPlNw6MQFE2SIPgRZAtmZLX6ssJTjYi5dIjzbhfzcIg7If6LdtVw2Yrb3z0N__wqQjxz9Mun-D66wnKirekOmf8-tFjX94u5KfsuZ5YgfS8wAoTsPWtEMh-qXMhFmi_i14zYZugn0KXPY8Q9XCj8fy9NmEP4fOEO9d6zUcDeztuzRZnq4xnweXrh7c6on2iGL6BJeGG3tOSU6vZK5pLjKQyjrd8u2WKwJn5ebr4igd_qlcoqr1WDySYvBpZCgZuRskqGxHQsPmfzeIdxG5x4Zt_BBuSjdnZcwUo-vsBr3zkhfF3PjdlqEZaOCnytW_NEAKy3gHgJt60H6vOzEvz-o0l9rLsOwKlTUTH3qsIBd74VZ6DvhyqWqdRWpVFyJUQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the "British Bulldog" captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill's accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93c3810746814eeb83586133f6cf9a5d&_e=6fQ9COrIbQyGya2pPZ4rFxHDPlNw6MQFE2SIPgRZAtmZLX6ssJTjYi5dIjzbhfzcIg7If6LdtVw2Yrb3z0N__wqQjxz9Mun-D66wnKirekOmf8-tFjX94u5KfsuZ5YgfS8wAoTsPWtEMh-qXMhFmi_i14zYZugn0KXPY8Q9XCj8fy9NmEP4fOEO9d6zUcDeztuzRZnq4xnweXrh7c6on2iGL6BJeGG3tOSU6vZK5pLjKQyjrd8u2WKwJn5ebr4ig2b1N2Fy9xbAsJnEtKnItR9UDElp83WDfSl70SUs_vBWWdxb-DHZOYxY3lHnoqUWubammStK0y_kxVg8e0BQZHpLbsGP-PJxXQPdmWf2pha1NLS7n-msCt_5M4HKeg2Xm0-EbW9Z_mXT2mFWBG05VmQ%3D%3D)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93c3810746814eeb83586133f6cf9a5d&_e=6fQ9COrIbQyGya2pPZ4rFxHDPlNw6MQFE2SIPgRZAtmZLX6ssJTjYi5dIjzbhfzcIg7If6LdtVw2Yrb3z0N__wqQjxz9Mun-D66wnKirekOmf8-tFjX94u5KfsuZ5YgfS8wAoTsPWtEMh-qXMhFmi_i14zYZugn0KXPY8Q9XCj8fy9NmEP4fOEO9d6zUcDeztuzRZnq4xnweXrh7c6on2iGL6BJeGG3tOSU6vZK5pLjKQyjrd8u2WKwJn5ebr4ig-eSF7G0NnNUh2oVr5-PSL_fW6Lh2o4D6Qc7dPw_0e_fT4PGLGrw_q9A-JZzi7vCbW5dNvnWPJASgefFx2X17qe0fboQWQgAmG8tNuOB8agt4jBp5IQ2hHDmBPRjVbw_mqjDB-IGuCyeH7YD4xCKL8w%3D%3D) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship**" on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93c3810746814eeb83586133f6cf9a5d&_e=6fQ9COrIbQyGya2pPZ4rFxHDPlNw6MQFE2SIPgRZAtmZLX6ssJTjYi5dIjzbhfzcIg7If6LdtVw2Yrb3z0N__wqQjxz9Mun-D66wnKirekOmf8-tFjX94u5KfsuZ5YgfS8wAoTsPWtEMh-qXMhFmi_i14zYZugn0KXPY8Q9XCj8fy9NmEP4fOEO9d6zUcDeztuzRZnq4xnweXrh7c6on2iGL6BJeGG3tOSU6vZK5pLjKQyjrd8u2WKwJn5ebr4igXKL7vev04qLHOjqhHEyWxg6GuVbWEFilWkDTJZNXGa3fHQux2qys-wxvgyZviWnAdX9O779LTnHXY_mLpJGNsB3Ak36zsKz0FIadvNc2c9A023RO2Pcs4YhyPbvCQb10MZNJp1twukWod435dl34rQ%3D%3D)_ You'll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill's words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
