name: Raphael Warnock (via Georgia House Democrats)
subject: I'm counting on you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Let me explain why your support is so critical.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54908673/380031953/-688951218?refcode=EM_FR_221121RWRunoff_SplitRW_RW_90DO_6_G_N_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDAwODdkNy1iYjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DL9pWVCPwIhErJwggAfBVdSFoeWk8zSCaeASiaZ0JD8=) Peter, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**

[**_Please, Peter, will you chip in $5 or more right now to split between the Georgia House Democrats and me so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54908674/380031958/-688951218?refcode=EM_FR_221121RWRunoff_SplitRW_RW_90DO_6_G_N_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDAwODdkNy1iYjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DL9pWVCPwIhErJwggAfBVdSFoeWk8zSCaeASiaZ0JD8=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54908675/380031959/-688951218?refcode=EM_FR_221121RWRunoff_SplitRW_RW_90DO_6_G_N_p1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDAwODdkNy1iYjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DL9pWVCPwIhErJwggAfBVdSFoeWk8zSCaeASiaZ0JD8=) I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.

**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever.**

[**_So please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you split $5 or more between the Georgia House Democrats and me to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54908676/380031969/-688951218?refcode=EM_FR_221121RWRunoff_SplitRW_RW_90DO_6_G_N_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDAwODdkNy1iYjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DL9pWVCPwIhErJwggAfBVdSFoeWk8zSCaeASiaZ0JD8=)

Thank you,

Reverend Warnock | The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to _flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia._ **To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?**

clean_body: Let me explain why your support is so critical. = Peter, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it. My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: = = I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress. They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever. = Thank you, Reverend Warnock | The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today? = Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC Georgia House Democratic Caucus PO Box 18622 Atlanta, GA 31126 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Content Warning: This email talks about gun violence. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54930487/380075767/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEyMGJkMC1lNjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXg-zXZv8obeFPmdl0vUi15pCu4YkaFtuCW8ZTiLTbc=)
Friends, On Saturday, we lost five young members of our Colorado community in another tragic shooting — this time at an LGBTQ nightclub, Club Q. I’m thinking of the families and loved ones of those we lost and sending strength to those who were injured, the survivors, and Colorado’s LGBTQ community. **Hate-fueled attacks like this are especially tragic because we know more can be done to prevent them.** We must do more to combat hate and protect our LGBTQ community, and we must act to keep weapons out of the hands of those who seek to commit acts of violence:
1. We need to build on the bipartisan gun safety legislation we passed this year and keep dangerous weapons off our streets.

2. We need to address our mental health crisis and have a serious discussion about combating online extremism.

3. We need to stand firm alongside our LGBTQ neighbors in the face of intolerance and discrimination. It’s on all of us to build a state and nation where everyone is accepted, respected, and loved.

**Violence and hate have no home in Colorado.** Let this tragedy in Colorado Springs be a reminder of the urgent work ahead of us. Let us fight tirelessly to prevent more loss of life. Today, I am asking you to split a contribution between One Colorado, a nonprofit dedicated to advancing LGBTQ rights in Colorado, and the Colorado Healing Fund, a nonprofit supporting the survivors, victims’ families, and the community. [**Please click here to make a tax-deductible donation in support of Colorado’s LGBTQ community.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54930488/380075768/1892053668?refcode=AU_MFB_CL_CHA_GEN_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEyMGJkMC1lNjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXg-zXZv8obeFPmdl0vUi15pCu4YkaFtuCW8ZTiLTbc=) | [SUPPORT LGTBQ COLORADANS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54930489/380075769/1892053668?refcode=AU_MFB_CL_CHA_GEN_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEyMGJkMC1lNjY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXg-zXZv8obeFPmdl0vUi15pCu4YkaFtuCW8ZTiLTbc=)
---
In solidarity,
Michael

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=15b4038804994d0b820478e53e45f2af&_e=fxkNVbE1eK7o-wNjJVnycr6PexCakEwm-JYzqF0B-jG64vRS41BNDlbtmSs9d84gyYIOl5EBEHhS5qGcLf9nE5WSbs4YZjMf973HOKy6YfWqOhGJY-SFUiI6gzdn97n_MLKpSHDy-uOjnSRXQ60RLHrlNt8DEEzhfrVNXT1HjG3zxqAL2BeVcAM99Mg4eZGP72TJNLC6tWWrL0-gXaU1GmV8usv1TAl6bGaB8-l7bAwtKSVFiirfVMUHu-6CzTrTT16jixGf8jQuqwHgIwkR-pDilUzoKBFtwKMKyo6zqXq235hpMMt4r7PJgYJdB5SBVEXFbn-qHL9ODrDEzdp2P_tu25HEy9N_yYcFMiKMInTsccrDCQlPgglLmQ1bpYlMjeEZR4gwvp8cLb_5GT33Fw6VPih5Lq1XHunrJ06IqRsTBlaaGvhPM0XKQnBQ8bDp-jpfyRVwFJhJ2-WUY0jDGg%3D%3D)**

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $5 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $5 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=15b4038804994d0b820478e53e45f2af&_e=fxkNVbE1eK7o-wNjJVnycr6PexCakEwm-JYzqF0B-jG64vRS41BNDlbtmSs9d84gyYIOl5EBEHhS5qGcLf9nE5WSbs4YZjMf973HOKy6YfWqOhGJY-SFUiI6gzdn97n_MLKpSHDy-uOjnSRXQ60RLHrlNt8DEEzhfrVNXT1HjG3zxqAL2BeVcAM99Mg4eZGP72TJNLC6tWWrL0-gXaU1GmV8usv1TAl6bGaB8-l7bAwtKSVFiirfVMUHu-6CzTrTT16jixGf8jQuqwHgIwkR-pDilUzoKBFtwKMKyo6zqXq235hpMMt4r7PJgYJdB5SBV7hOWkpn5lO-aT45BRT0jS5kUVyptiHScMIEdCnqKfB96j1srRfjpCgOZjSwhduf2dog4mhTA7LixKayE8Ha5_Q8RzvsCQSCisI-PfH4p0725IJL15NVdj2icNHRAvo0YQdxxhegMLA-cOvghiijlA%3D%3D)**

Chip in $5 -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=15b4038804994d0b820478e53e45f2af&_e=fxkNVbE1eK7o-wNjJVnycr6PexCakEwm-JYzqF0B-jG64vRS41BNDlbtmSs9d84gyYIOl5EBEHhS5qGcLf9nE5WSbs4YZjMf973HOKy6YfWqOhGJY-SFUiI6gzdn97n_MLKpSHDy-uOjnSRXQ60RLHrlNt8DEEzhfrVNXT1HjG3zxqAL2BeVcAM99Mg4eZGP72TJNLC6tWWrL0-gXaU1GmV8usv1TAl6bGaB8-l7bAwtKSVFiirfVMUHu-6CzTrTT16jixGf8jQuqwHgIwkR-pDilUzoKBFtwKMKyo6zqXq235hpMMt4r7PJgYJdB5SBOaIxeY3LvTCGjXdmMmUdFfvHpjieF_9k6Joq-9oEVHdXcB519Zazva_jJBsyLQETRguwsDyPnP_jVvrtgyaJ9ks6PDq_4PZWkMzYKPAJLeE_556vpbA1YuO0iOkZLeOR6JjO_hqlJVf1IbAwqCJRLg%3D%3D)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

clean_body: I have an update on our ground game in this critical Georgia Senate race. WATCH NOW. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th. Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible. Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on. Today's Goal: Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $5 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters. How we win: By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th. We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want. I sincerely hope you'll answer the call. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e50b0d0309344409d40e7b660d569da&_e=g9TI-Bu-jBcqNV46GKiMf1eu4gTki7RbTiyX0TW2EtoTtRysx0s6pID56rv8hVegrk5ThSsEzDWR0AoJGVjXtE5-Ca7bRap9F6fFCTcFAz2fg6JArhxQ6EddP7G4lucNd8gn4d-QmMDORskpBCSika86ZDuPuazIdgId64GvrQZ4aaq3w98nyt23h0ftM-i1W2LHOy0x_dHr6kRzflgWVevhPYbaZEHy0Iik7DYsQf1399hqOmuzKUQlVw7aYPtqbtjaslekcj1UpLefU83Gh4RlIteP8YNY1KaX84Ps41M9T8A74K1sOSMKfUuEbZY967H7ToAVP6W6-O1xy6Y2jQ%3D%3D)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake.)

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What 's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** "They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e50b0d0309344409d40e7b660d569da&_e=g9TI-Bu-jBcqNV46GKiMf1eu4gTki7RbTiyX0TW2EtoTtRysx0s6pID56rv8hVegrk5ThSsEzDWR0AoJGVjXtE5-Ca7bRap9F6fFCTcFAz2fg6JArhxQ6EddP7G4lucNd8gn4d-QmMDORskpBCSika86ZDuPuazIdgId64GvrQZ4aaq3w98nyt23h0ftM-i1SgVLFb81sG8GosiygBC_5tNYaO6qMHsEDrB17xssXiS2c_NvtsDhRgxU8pt4aa8S4ZrNPGjQVK37eEQ3BjrN_ba07lOv3T4P4dVWUfnLzy28Bdv0ZFn5M9Erhc_LiieAAuNgkJt_sRzoe1ajrEnQBg%3D%3D)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e50b0d0309344409d40e7b660d569da&_e=g9TI-Bu-jBcqNV46GKiMf1eu4gTki7RbTiyX0TW2EtoTtRysx0s6pID56rv8hVegrk5ThSsEzDWR0AoJGVjXtE5-Ca7bRap9F6fFCTcFAz2fg6JArhxQ6EddP7G4lucNd8gn4d-QmMDORskpBCSika86ZDuPuazIdgId64GvrQZ4aaq3w98nyt23h0ftM-i1_eDqNISHMFJvC8OeAJibKiSBPXBffjg7psZZn-Y5xWzBojB27XJ1Ozf_0Gl6hXQigb1EVNfR7ctGqQ-rFnpqrv1wFRzy1ZFFMdBd0khdR22aQ607GHx2iH0_ihLgfNIbJP4tigFeyf1YWv1giJECqw%3D%3D)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! They're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d027ec492a144e9b241f6365085555d&_e=Wobjd9OaaAe61nzZ-RBCmpnCp93HT9SEFeP90uTWip9GI88aYiA27bNwFAGkYe4t8sDDyQmMTvDAYT4NsC9RldwLZ_lTgP35s8fKYIcvPbu8T8rq6VWxluEdumUS5pD0IDqKbVJUhnHXqUtUK1FrBD0e3CpJv7Y32b7sdWKSc9xNDQsVNcvB4Vj8nsAJN-EOhwljy9Ioef2jU4-rCRb5kuUv-zj5wCLEAl3BmkLBiOMvQZReEd78WQ4E1OsR5e_kJFIbWXxQyNY4UVS347SGR71oN3_vldX1yhomal7qAUKGTO3S5aCbhXB38zKCfQ8o)

| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d027ec492a144e9b241f6365085555d&_e=Wobjd9OaaAe61nzZ-RBCmpnCp93HT9SEFeP90uTWip9GI88aYiA27bNwFAGkYe4t8sDDyQmMTvDAYT4NsC9RldwLZ_lTgP35s8fKYIcvPbu8T8rq6VWxluEdumUS5pD0IDqKbVJUhnHXqUtUK1FrBD0e3CpJv7Y32b7sdWKSc9xJzTO69Egj3B-HgGUSqIQZVLViF8-eYW0npbB3AGPmIEeWW4WT8UpRjHUvf-gT22i2SiQc4Ty9Gc3nHD52IKDNX-aHsuXOvdV_RLQ8yLe2usOXpLvXySPJ_Aejwnd7TNZBDasf2lH-NLLu9Shc95Hi) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d027ec492a144e9b241f6365085555d&_e=Wobjd9OaaAe61nzZ-RBCmpnCp93HT9SEFeP90uTWip9GI88aYiA27bNwFAGkYe4t8sDDyQmMTvDAYT4NsC9RldwLZ_lTgP35s8fKYIcvPbu8T8rq6VWxluEdumUS5pD0IDqKbVJUhnHXqUtUK1FrBD0e3CpJv7Y32b7sdWKSc9z3q89NTNWThAUUMbBzX_ijzMAsBV22l6TVZZbb_8tc3FRKIWxH3V3EM65pZKyHE_am2OyaGHNTIKyaIMWcq-NZzEr3tXdn10Hksuz8_8fvdkpcL24MkzI8a24dIMt7umO_EVkwaZ31cxLv3bynX0VW)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d027ec492a144e9b241f6365085555d&_e=Wobjd9OaaAe61nzZ-RBCmpnCp93HT9SEFeP90uTWip9GI88aYiA27bNwFAGkYe4t8sDDyQmMTvDAYT4NsC9RldwLZ_lTgP35s8fKYIcvPbu8T8rq6VWxluEdumUS5pD0IDqKbVJUhnHXqUtUK1FrBD0e3CpJv7Y32b7sdWKSc9xgjgsL2NtapcpJxgTWjlL-0vQaU_fHm_JCmBsJfMSwqAwi0CEDdgcSpOEMVXQy2oZCL7zvhpVa6C7GUVWgwGBXnT1UHvkwGSX8kS0r_JOAWbuDJY4BEYJG4vJ0AX3r9EZHj9xATw-TLHpLAtp1OwE6)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d027ec492a144e9b241f6365085555d&_e=Wobjd9OaaAe61nzZ-RBCmpnCp93HT9SEFeP90uTWip9GI88aYiA27bNwFAGkYe4t8sDDyQmMTvDAYT4NsC9RldwLZ_lTgP35s8fKYIcvPbu8T8rq6VWxluEdumUS5pD0IDqKbVJUhnHXqUtUK1FrBD0e3CpJv7Y32b7sdWKSc9ya5cJITXvsjTxwhwoyuIKH2RXAZzWu5mB7ixWCHnjyrLI7uipbc_8qLAEhvQ5oTxFVwOulXuKPfnM0T6GKASWiHB3sMd0_xv8HEEcrxqtfzf3ABRsEVmbaD1XoGoY_9-j7ALOmA5i86fsUA9NRX64W)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d027ec492a144e9b241f6365085555d&_e=Wobjd9OaaAe61nzZ-RBCmpnCp93HT9SEFeP90uTWip9GI88aYiA27bNwFAGkYe4t8sDDyQmMTvDAYT4NsC9RldwLZ_lTgP35s8fKYIcvPbu8T8rq6VWxluEdumUS5pD0IDqKbVJUhnHXqUtUK1FrBD0e3CpJv7Y32b7sdWKSc9ykSTsTknkRuhBgobMnAXahjPczxh9C4YoXLQhzYo0JQVwrPbURnYufU4RrbZOrXmpfVr9Mh7L2EAoLUj5yG8sitUhJrIPTg7sBJBSlhEEY-pJhSy5BWYrQva_S4Ya4zwmZWeubeSyk8nAB8WV5WG7L)

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

body:

This can't wait, friend:
**We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
**[If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Jacky Rosen so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54930944/380077575/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2252-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2ViOTJkYi1lNzY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPTxTTl4qaD0UPK12BeKo25-yIMVocuInMkVe2k6hKo=)**
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than **$52 million** to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election.
**We need to fight back ASAP , or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend:
**[Will you split $5 between me and Jacky Rosen right now so we can close our gap, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54930945/380077576/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2252-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2ViOTJkYi1lNzY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPTxTTl4qaD0UPK12BeKo25-yIMVocuInMkVe2k6hKo=)**

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932099:JNDqbyGNM:m:1:3372944669:3CA9EC30BF2632FC8FEEEE2E4C273CE5:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932099:JNDqbyGNM:m:1:3372944669:3CA9EC30BF2632FC8FEEEE2E4C273CE5:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932099:JNDqbyGNM:m:1:3372944669:3CA9EC30BF2632FC8FEEEE2E4C273CE5:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932099:JNDqbyGNM:m:1:3372944669:3CA9EC30BF2632FC8FEEEE2E4C273CE5:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932099:JNDqbyGNM:m:1:3372944669:3CA9EC30BF2632FC8FEEEE2E4C273CE5:r)

Herschel Walker

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

subject: 3 reasons we NEED you to step up today, Derek.

body:
#
We are going to be direct with you, Derek. We _NEED_ you to support VoteVets today. Here are three reasons why:
1. Republican leadership faced a huge upset when they saw their projected “red wave” turn into a mere “red puddle” on Election Day. Now, they're turning all their attention to the Georgia runoff and flooding Herschel Walker’s campaign with millions. VoteVets can help Rev. Warnock compete with that money.

2. VoteVets has consistently been one of the largest outside spending organizations every election — _spending $23 million alone this cycle_ — and will use its money to expose Herschel Walker’s anti-veteran antics. This country cannot afford to elect someone who has scammed Veterans and defrauded the government for insurance money to the Senate. VoteVets will amplify that truth about Walker.

3. Our ads have proven to move polls — even moving the Georgia senate race by 10 points. With Hershel Walker in a runoff in 3 weeks, we need to make sure we have the funding to defeat him once and for all.

[**So we need to ask, Derek: Can you contribute $3 or anything you can afford to VoteVets today? Your contribution will be put to use immediately in the Georgia runoff.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov22.YYvGrB&refcode=em221121-1-15-full&t=1&akid=7181%2E3013755%2EfkMd-f)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=24abcc033f134021bf13b02098635223&_e=wiI0iYYvnSWzCNAzKOV2UbyTNc5hiLYC9k0Q239_XnA3onA3x1jcNn83uWWy4H1ibZKdBh61lL-so70qY4eqhtgr6AR6FLcXyGkXkp9rZzGnsKC7fv7Vp6srYe-eAbWtiyzP0XpDylrkswxRd-FTibco9uMzJ79_i1npuDwqnoOfKUrSw1yQxoWTDQAumqD3AY2MVqAuXvGLPO0sT4K0BjiuJISZFqj2knB2yQzE3AzYaA9wfFMGJ8TiokMpyO3IiMTT3TW9keQEcM5UBm75sujvQfFgxy7xGY2V2C8F4-CRN6U1MFMh8ISObFGXeeUMKSohxB599Rqc7EsM8kL3CNrC7fp-8eoXMSdFVVrVh9N7vOxrX7BZbKkwVy_7cO_sQ0sV4eqTo1YWRX3ymMUuU0s04CCH0EdQBbFWHyJ7dRPSo2zZPoL5JzWwW0KNjGMQ)**

clean_body: I have an update on our ground game in this critical Georgia Senate race. WATCH NOW. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th. Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible. Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on. Today's Goal: Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $5 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters. How we win: By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th. We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want. I sincerely hope you'll answer the call. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING NEWS - Vargas: It's Time for IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy to Resign, Now
body:
The people of Illinois need to know that the GOP is serious about rebuilding and putting the best team in place to win.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/6a739d4802be/breaking-news-vargas-its-time-for-il-gop-chairman-don-tracy-to-resign-now?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c2765a3522-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_21_05_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c2765a3522-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Vargas: It's Time for IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy to Resign, Now (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-its-time-for-il-gop-chairman-don-tracy-to-resign-now.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c2765a3522-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_21_05_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c2765a3522-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

It is impossible to sugarcoat this and tell you that there’s hope for Republicans in Illinois. Not only did we lose every statewide office, but we lost badly down ballot as well.

Illinois Senate and House Republicans suffered debilitating defeats on election night, prompting House GOP leader Jim Durkin, R, to resign the day after the election and Senate GOP leader Dan McConchie, R, to resign less than a week later.

The losses leave Republicans in both chambers irrelevant in Springfield and gives Democrats a comfortable supermajority.

This is unacceptable.

============================================================

There are a lot of reasons why Republicans in Illinois lost the election – $100 million directed at the campaigns of two candidates leaving a lack of funding for down ballot candidates; a divided GOP; a weak candidate at the top of the ticket whose race was called within minutes of the polls closing; no mail-in-ballot program and weak voter integrity initiatives.

And we can’t ignore the impact the abortion issue had on this election. It energized the Democratic base, labeled pro life Republicans as “extremists” and drove suburban women in masses to vote either early, by mail-in-ballot, or on November 8th.

If Illinois Republicans want to start winning again, it’s going to take a united party; a diversified pool of money and an emphasis on building a robust mail-in-ballot program.

It’s also going to take new Illinois GOP leadership – and it is why I am calling on IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy to resign. Resign Now.

The people of Illinois need to know that the GOP is serious about rebuilding and putting the best team in place to win.

If Don Tracy can take credit for victories, then he most certainly can take responsibility for losses. And the losses were many.

Virtually the entire House GOP leadership team either lost or retired.

As Capitol News’ ** Peter Hancock (https://capitolnewsillinois.com/NEWS/mccombie-to-take-reins-of-house-gop-caucus?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c2765a3522-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_21_05_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c2765a3522-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
noted, House Deputy Minority Leaders Dan Brady, R, and Tom Demmer, R, were defeated in their bids for statewide office; Assistant House Minority Leader Avery Bourne, R, who ran for lieutenant governor, was defeated in the primary; Assistant Minority Leader Keith Wheeler, R, was defeated for re-election; and Minority Conference Chairman David Welter, R, was also defeated.

Minority Floor Leader Mark Batnick, R, chose not to run for re-election and Assistant Minority Leader Tim Butler, R, is resigning to take a job in the public sector.

To put it simply, this is a disaster.

House GOP Minority Leader Jim Durkin and Senate Minority Leader Dan McConchie resigning their leadership positions isn’t enough.

Don Tracy is a businessman who along with his siblings run the nation’s largest redistributor of food and related products. That business employs 6,000 people in the US and Canada.

Now, do you think they got here by rewarding losing sales teams?

Do you think they got here by consistently rewarding sales managers who fail to meet their quotas?

The Illinois GOP is not a family business. We don’t report to you – you report to us – the people.

The Illinois GOP is now a national joke – and as the Chairman of the IL GOP, you bear responsibility.

The buck stops here. The buck stops with you. Show that you can lead by resigning now.

We can’t win otherwise.

** (https://youtu.be/tTpct-8Z8ls?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c2765a3522-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_21_05_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c2765a3522-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Mark Vargas Calls on IL GOP Leadership to Resign, on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 (November 20, 2022)

Mark A. Vargas is host of WIND AM 560's "Mark My Words" and now serves as the Editor-in-Chief of Illinois Review.

To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c2765a3522-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_21_05_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c2765a3522-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z56bj4884g9fd5dajso6dojv6f65dco2ok9b5d10_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1jm0pr2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmg360nrp1o3alv3pbp8pkpem250140ijvfvktpo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1jm0pr2c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsmoguh0n7unq8nvvtdk1leag2lrfisa46652lc0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1jm0pr2c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | I wasn't on the ballot in 2022, but I asked a lot of you. Again and again, you came through. Combined, all the folks on Team Merkley made over 55,000 grassroots donations supporting other Democrats – the Oregon Blue Victory Fund, our powerhouse candidates in Oregon – Andrea, Val, Tina, and Jamie – and Senators and Senate candidates in tough races across the country. I'm thrilled that we protected strong majorities in the Oregon House and Senate, as well. **Without dedicated champions like you, Democrats would not have held the line in the U.S. Senate, kept it close in the U.S. House, and ensured progressive leadership in our state capital.** **_Thank you for all that you did._** I am looking forward to working with Governor-elect Tina Kotek, Representative-elect Andrea Salinas, and Representative-elect Val Hoyle to make life better for all Oregonians. It will be great to work with John Fetterman in the Senate and — after we help Raphael Warnock win his runoff — we'll have a little bigger majority to keep pushing strong solutions for working families. Together, we'll work to make housing, college, and health care more affordable; we'll keep up the fight on the climate crisis; we'll deliver relief for working families and hold big corporations accountable; we'll defend our democracy from the extremists and radicals who've given up on America; and we'll keep adding judges to our federal courts who respect our freedoms and our constitutional vision of equal justice under the law. **We couldn't have done this without you. Thank you.** Onward! _Jeff_ P.S. I want to sound a note of appreciation for Jamie McLeod-Skinner. She fought a good fight in a very tough district. She may not have been victorious, but I know that her campaign lifted other candidates whose districts overlapped with hers. She deserves our gratitude. | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | name: United Rural Democrats
subject: You should be proud, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Let’s celebrate these wins | | | Hi Peter – Let's celebrate the wins that we've from Election Night, Peter. We're proud to announce that many of our endorsed candidates won their election campaigns , and we can't wait to see the progress that they will bring to rural districts across the country. Here's a highlight of results in some of the races that we closely worked with: **URD-endorsed candidates won re-election for Governor.**
* Jared Polis - Colorado
* Gretchen Whitmer - Michigan
* Tim Walz - Minnesota
* Tony Evers - Wisconsin
* Laura Kelly - Kansas

**We defended battleground districts from flipping red in key Congressional races.**
* Dan Kildee: Won re-election in Michigan's 5th congressional district.
* Abigail Spanberger: Won re-election in Virginia's 7th congressional district.
* Chris Deluzio: Won election in Pennsylvania's 17th congressional district.

**We defied the odds, showing that Democratic messaging and organizing works in rural areas.**
* Wiley Nickel: Beat Republican challenger Bo Hines in North Carolina's 13th congressional district.
* Josh Shapiro: Beat Republican challenger Douglas Mastriano to serve as governor of Pennsylvania.
* John Fetterman: Beat Republican challenger Dr. Oz in Pennsylvania's Senate race.

Follow us on [Twitter](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhm2OEa6fogNWsFFbWKZ1iWFt5xeeBK4a8VXXfuZ0pfWCuT3U2Qkw4t-qbRITS5Yu2v7k8BW_Kbm1Iazr1o4X-q5MO-fI23vGDCLOJPCwcN6baYRkUdeHCP3sEE7ScTheC_3EnZ7sMw_4O_aLBe9vHMknWFdDR3-92DH-sYjbYRYn5eP68sqwEL5NansdTIaeOROAbww8h8UE2F4vVmfFOr8Y172OrBCYjvjLWV1l8X5VCvfnlFHvteuqfzNjLIVOzDHtuTraNB6rnf1KGXfd_fNkOSEpFrYZAWWL9MaLTFI_/3rc/KgK0zgi_RQOxLXEpppnHSA/h0/MN4VclSZ7Yj9-8ogDHBnUg6vI1pv0zNKAejpx5FbkD0) for the latest updates on our endorsed candidates. We are so thankful to you for your support throughout this election season. These results are wins that we should be proud of, and having Democrats in office will translate to protections for key issues, including education, voting rights, reproductive health, climate action, and more. **The fight doesn't stop here, and we can still make headway, especially in rural districts.** We look forward to continuing the fight with you, Peter. \-- United Rural Democrats
---

United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. **Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?**

clean_body: Let’s celebrate these wins | | | Hi Peter – Let's celebrate the wins that we've from Election Night, Peter. We're proud to announce that many of our endorsed candidates won their election campaigns , and we can't wait to see the progress that they will bring to rural districts across the country. Here's a highlight of results in some of the races that we closely worked with: URD-endorsed candidates won re-election for Governor. Jared Polis - Colorado Gretchen Whitmer - Michigan Tim Walz - Minnesota Tony Evers - Wisconsin Laura Kelly - Kansas We defended battleground districts from flipping red in key Congressional races. Dan Kildee: Won re-election in Michigan's 5th congressional district. Abigail Spanberger: Won re-election in Virginia's 7th congressional district. Chris Deluzio: Won election in Pennsylvania's 17th congressional district. We defied the odds, showing that Democratic messaging and organizing works in rural areas. Wiley Nickel: Beat Republican challenger Bo Hines in North Carolina's 13th congressional district. Josh Shapiro: Beat Republican challenger Douglas Mastriano to serve as governor of Pennsylvania. John Fetterman: Beat Republican challenger Dr. Oz in Pennsylvania's Senate race. Follow us on for the latest updates on our endorsed candidates. We are so thankful to you for your support throughout this election season. These results are wins that we should be proud of, and having Democrats in office will translate to protections for key issues, including education, voting rights, reproductive health, climate action, and more. The fight doesn't stop here, and we can still make headway, especially in rural districts. We look forward to continuing the fight with you, Peter. \-- United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

| | We’ve been all gas no brakes since the moment the Runoff Election got put on the calendar here in Georgia. **And we can’t believe we’re saying this, but statewide early voting begins across the state in the next week, with some counties starting even sooner! ** Georgians have shown up and shown out at the polls in recent elections — but our work isn’t over. To send our voting rights champion Senator Raphael Warnock back to the U.S. Senate for another six years, we’ve got to ensure that every eligible voter’s ballot is cast and every voice is heard. And we’re counting on dedicated grassroots supporters like you to power our voter mobilization and protection efforts to push Senator Warnock over the finish line. [_**So we’re asking: Will you chip in $20 or anything you can to help make sure we’re able to turn out as many voters as possible and send our voting rights champion Senator Warnock back to the U.S. Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54932842/380084556/-941199594?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221121_f_early_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTQxMzQ4MS1mMzY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NesaOFgpKbvNEWIpntKmv-SXmjvEnYOcdgoprXpAW-0=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54932843/380084557/-941199594?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221121_f_early_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTQxMzQ4MS1mMzY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NesaOFgpKbvNEWIpntKmv-SXmjvEnYOcdgoprXpAW-0=)

As voters request their mail ballots and head to the polls, we need to go all out to ensure they're turning out and able to vote as easily as possible. This is especially important because Gov. Brian Kemp’s voter suppression bill (SB 202) means we have half the amount of time to turn out voters than in previous runoffs — and early vote and vote-by-mail options are constricted over previous runoffs.
In Georgia, we know a thing or two about runoff elections, and we’ve proven that we have what it takes to win. We’re already working around the clock to propel Senator Warnock to victory, but we’ll need your continued support to get there.
There’s so much at stake with this election: protecting our freedom to vote, access to health care, earning a livable wage, and so much more. These are all the things Senator Warnock fights for as our senator, so we’re not letting a moment go to waste in this fight to send him back to the Senate.
[_**With this Runoff Election happening a month earlier than last cycle, and with voting options limited by SB 202, we’re running out of time to get out the vote. Please chip in $20 or anything you can right away to win big for Senator Warnock in this Runoff Election.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54932844/380084558/-941199594?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221121_f_early_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTQxMzQ4MS1mMzY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NesaOFgpKbvNEWIpntKmv-SXmjvEnYOcdgoprXpAW-0=)

clean_body: As voters submit their mail-in ballots and head to the polls, we need to go all out to ensure they're turning out and able to vote as easily as possible. | | | We’ve been all gas no brakes since the moment the Runoff Election got put on the calendar here in Georgia. And we can’t believe we’re saying this, but statewide early voting begins across the state in the next week, with some counties starting even sooner! Georgians have shown up and shown out at the polls in recent elections — but our work isn’t over. To send our voting rights champion Senator Raphael Warnock back to the U.S. Senate for another six years, we’ve got to ensure that every eligible voter’s ballot is cast and every voice is heard. And we’re counting on dedicated grassroots supporters like you to power our voter mobilization and protection efforts to push Senator Warnock over the finish line. = | = As voters request their mail ballots and head to the polls, we need to go all out to ensure they're turning out and able to vote as easily as possible. This is especially important because Gov. Brian Kemp’s voter suppression bill (SB 202) means we have half the amount of time to turn out voters than in previous runoffs — and early vote and vote-by-mail options are constricted over previous runoffs. In Georgia, we know a thing or two about runoff elections, and we’ve proven that we have what it takes to win. We’re already working around the clock to propel Senator Warnock to victory, but we’ll need your continued support to get there. There’s so much at stake with this election: protecting our freedom to vote, access to health care, earning a livable wage, and so much more. These are all the things Senator Warnock fights for as our senator, so we’re not letting a moment go to waste in this fight to send him back to the Senate. = = Thanks so much, The Fair Fight Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2022 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: You are not our personal ATM
body:
We want to inspire you to take action — not scare you.
#
Peter,
Too many organizations — like the DCCC — see their grassroots supporters as their personal ATM. They use scare tactics, guilt, and misleading language to coax people into donating. **Peter, we will never do that to you.**
Instead, we honestly ask for support from supporters like you — because our work to recruit and elect Justice Democrats who will transform the Democratic Party requires significant resources.
Make no mistake, sometimes being up against the political establishment can be scary. When far-right groups like AIPAC are dropping millions against our candidates, the situation does become urgent.
**But at JD, we want to inspire you to take action — not scare you.** It comes down to this: YOU are the heart of this work.
[**That’s why we’re respectfully asking if you will make a $3 donation so we can continue to recruit more Justice Democrats and grow the Squad? We just fell a little bit behind on our fundraising and could really use your help in this moment.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121598?refcode=em20221121-26182&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26182%2E1203867%2Ekf9U8R)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121598?refcode=em20221121-26182&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26182%2E1203867%2Ekf9U8R)**
[****](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121598?refcode=em20221121-26182&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26182%2E1203867%2Ekf9U8R)
Even if you can’t chip in today, know that we are deeply grateful to have you in the movement with us, and hope you find value in each of these messages.
**Thank you for fighting in this movement with us.**
With gratitude,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=26182%2E1203867%2Ekf9U8R) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=26182%2E1203867%2Ekf9U8R) and your state public health department.
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z527msic379r3gr31mtnifq6fbmvvk85ht34tvu8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1jm8or1cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zknnssg5k0m85pf0of3nr2ech4f87mc8abhsubjo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1jm8or1cph2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z88necuc6do7q55m9i3sb7lfv01kirfs2qkid6dg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1jm8or1cph2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zct83v2bi3dvd68v80dalfpr6jvos8m9mjb9q4r0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s1jm8or1cph2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

body:
| | | Team -- Mitch McConnell is doing everything he can to BLOCK President Biden's agenda, so we _must defeat_ his right-wing allies to fight back. **Our first opportunity is just weeks away when Republican Herschel Walker faces Senator Raphael Warnock in the Georgia runoff:**

Team, in a 50-50 Senate, **every single seat matters.**

That’s why it’s so critical that we win our 51st seat in the Georgia Senate runoff to help safeguard our progress and protect President Biden’s agenda from McConnell’s obstruction.

**But Republicans are spending MILLIONS right now to elect Trump’s handpicked candidate and deliver this seat to McConnell.** If we don’t keep pace with the GOP’s megadonors, it’ll BADLY damage our chances against far-right Herschel Walker -- and right now, we’re _well short_ of our $250,000 emergency goal.

This situation is dire: We could lose unless we turn our fundraising around _immediately!_ But we REFUSE to take off days or abandon our fundraising goals in the face of Trump’s megadonors. **There is WAY too much at stake, so we'll ask one last time:**

**[Will you chip in to fight for President Biden's Senate majority? name: New Hampshire Republican State Committee
subject: Every single vote should count
body:
New Hampshire Republican State Committee

|
## Derek --
## It's November 21st and NH elections aren't over.
## That's because NH Democrats are suing to stop the counting of ballots in a recount that could potentially hurt us.
## NH Dems Chairman Ray Buckley doesn't think every vote should be counted. Why? He and the NH Dems don't care about fair elections and don't care about your vote.
##
## ^This is disenfranchisement by the NH Dems.
## We have worked way too hard and our candidates have worked way too hard to allow this fraudulent attack on election integrity to move forward.
## Now we are asking for your, the voter's, help.

name: American Update
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0175%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=S5EvbXrwTe6ZAOHJKSVoEA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40440%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=abdTwrYq2lkSHuMLJ8S33Q&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40441%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4HZ3PtKei9JlFCYU6GUYgw&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40442%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RV3seNJ7W6pdKvyoPZl9rA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0175%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=S5EvbXrwTe6ZAOHJKSVoEA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0175%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=S5EvbXrwTe6ZAOHJKSVoEA&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4a32348b053345889ec07f15f7988dd9&_e=6FOlClefL2n4ACNaNsBz1g5DoXFgKDlSutXI2Vvt9sywM7ktMo8QynBEq3QembGfNbDtm0YUSc6yQCGlJvXjyOqTjTntouH5lRlxxrcVAYJx5KGrUDJ0rTRHtyRIOJsuDAdJKljPHMJa5Pq_-69rshSrxazs92oIYBq-TueC-rq79RHMt4NX3K50utXmqTphfLBBjKik8eXjQ5tm4Ub_de0mrzuyixc9fpy_7nV1jOP2gE3WmyNRDvQFOXPYtZCtMLvJptRTrYRqRiNVSLhF40_0oYKZqYTdfuLonYoFs1Zf4zqHziLxvCwu0cMICpuBgkociNRxf2LkxZJWyXpR_G2uYR8yaZjN-ZHAthyhpp5xFC9IsOUWG5ipHVlgq1i7RKylTP3XD8sLpMmbg6uhqttAM1F96JMWefioE-nZxXG_HwFFROHuErUjY7O3Umt6PgwiGrQ7YDBuH4msYocrExT4eMEi2xl8H0ifWsAuMq5OPvhalhxSQ2IYUHn-X26H)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4a32348b053345889ec07f15f7988dd9&_e=6FOlClefL2n4ACNaNsBz1g5DoXFgKDlSutXI2Vvt9sywM7ktMo8QynBEq3QembGfNbDtm0YUSc6yQCGlJvXjyOqTjTntouH5lRlxxrcVAYJx5KGrUDJ0rTRHtyRIOJsuDAdJKljPHMJa5Pq_-69rshSrxazs92oIYBq-TueC-rq79RHMt4NX3K50utXmqTphfLBBjKik8eXjQ5tm4Ub_de0mrzuyixc9fpy_7nV1jOP2gE3WmyNRDvQFOXPYtZCtMLvJptRTrYRqRiNVSLhF40_0oYKZqYTdfuLonYoFs1Zf4zqHziLxvCwu0cMICpuBgkociNRxf2LkxZJWyXpR_G2uYR8yaZjN-ZHAthyhpp7h6jzLF4H1Nrm4Lig1cW4bMlxdYqzsUEWFasYsksEqQmUp0CnGmRdoYQwTImKEYJtwaBvo_XoByUqCU0RHCux3-fW-IS4HuiIfnTJ7KM5LE_UAbZO4GbIkOlNJ1eAuJt9-4RyXzmv-ECqz-AbHsCK0)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

clean_body: We launched our first ad of the runoff, but we’re not up on as many stations as we’d like to be. | Fellow American, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Hi there, Rev. Warnock here — I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign — and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State — and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal — and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

clean_body: | | | | Your ammunition for the mind. | | | THE GOOD FIGHT Your ammunition for the mind. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Long Elections Shake Confidence | | | Anthony Feist November 21, 2022 | As we digest the midterm results and prepare for , let us make some observations about where we stand and what patriots can expect going forward. The votes just keep coming: In places like Arizona and the great state of Oregon, there are still outstanding votes that have not been tallied. Arizona and canvassing, or certification, is not expected until December. And while the "election denier" epithet was launched even prior to November 8 by the liberal legacy media, . Furthermore, the answer for issues on election day.
