body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q9jjjrw2ryTE7Ws88BIjfMoRVv8X3djpiipxC3l3yVC_3KldcgsAw5h13KVmgqlCXtfG_89hYVblp0XOumFZJDOCuqXdYdCDR2rin7b9D5hr6kBv4bA1Uurzi0T8Iqkwyyg0H1nJwz4Ox_N24UvD-hPQQzF4Hz1qgs9K7Sv_AzJ9g2BPdkXrmhiItV-aPCk_jE3Pav0SjLZNLI9k3RU1G0xpwIz3i5-_9TLdZMC6EwT9g/3rc/ko5x1-OjRMO2SoV5dyqdNA/h0/Kbt9Oq114Rb2X0Qr69K8jn3BgX3kWrggHow7dZfm58k)
Peter, Five are dead and over two dozen people are wounded after a gunman entered a gay nightclub in Colorado Springs and opened fire with an AR-15. Time and time again, Republicans lend their ‘thoughts and prayers’ to victims’ families without taking meaningful action to curb gun violence. Worse, their dangerous rhetoric has put an increased target on LGBT people, just as it has with immigrants, people of color, and other communities that Tucker Carlson, Sean Hannity, Newsmax, and right-wing politicians regularly demonize. When they call us dangerous predators, their followers hear those messages and believe them – including the least stable, most violent of their followers. The bipartisan Safer Communities Act passed by Congress this past June only took limited action. The bill did some important things, but it left a lot out, because it was limited by what Republicans would be willing to support. And Republicans are not willing to ban AR-15s, require universal background checks, limit magazine capacity, or take many other measures that would make us safer. Why, when Democrats control both Houses of Congress (at least for another six weeks) do we have to rely on what the Republicans are willing to do? Because of the filibuster. The filibuster that all but two Democrats - Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin - are willing to change or get rid of. Simply put, the filibuster has enabled more people to die from gun violence. But Sinema is okay with that, because “bipartisanship” is more important than saving lives. How many more families will lose a loved one to gun violence? How many more people will die? How many more nightclubs, grocery stores, and schools need to get shot up before politicians like Kyrsten Sinema and the Republicans in the Senate are willing to prioritize human lives over political machinations? This is one reason we’re going all in to make sure Kyrsten Sinema is replaced by a better Democrat. We promise we’ll only support a candidate who will do whatever it takes to end gun violence in America. [**If you can, chip in a few dollars to help us today - or just pass this message on so other people will understand the stakes >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSb_YxSrFhKRcn0rO4zSa3z01heW4hgj8a9pcS2-SCCfNEwmxaxUspFWmZjDgMvUmYSC6vuCvxbvkZgK4SXLSRZmDkfj-ttBtFzjx56NedU-DWd-gKARlh3BDiry7SivxNLpLw0mfllEXauX7Vj2YFzyOQ7-eebvImZz8QBpJkbWonVPyZZKrIq3Dd-5LQtInT_DeHpUwGQZ5NcNStkh8VPAIhvBSfNW4MCgNlJ6TbvxN-z0adWZkYf1j_h_3O1XFYI2I6jDLmBHiS78NofNsK9WaQIYN7pMk3SqXxli_orOp_jC3b7SNLvmgGwhxXc8P8/3rc/ko5x1-OjRMO2SoV5dyqdNA/h1/KIk5-YxO85bnZzseHon4CtzcJL5bqC4JPTcO8ULlAKk) [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSpLhH8vXnJuPwLsPI-rKahc-o7Ei4c4AliD3c2raHVNqKJghZtSJ6x-rVGbo_z7HnWvj_B6K6nZ-A5KqY9FJ0Nd7nKFhXLHsbwuqtLlC_n1MduTHQBkf8BYWg4w43IP9l0k5oLKdc9otm8_gtAbrdNpZ9rbzBZI5G1iwi1_-t_5lAPmAQqqAPoRM2mF9FOJjkQnESuU7g19RfLanVZNSgHfbjOiyWump1lENzgLxxWfngd9uW3AiVoug39__2k45HlIqOGV8Emzu2lyl5n4RGad4F1euFPNQIYwQt3oRMcHh4-axxny36XtlMZvDXpRxA/3rc/ko5x1-OjRMO2SoV5dyqdNA/h2/lSIw2ELlo81ZFNeh3NvZAh-9XAO_ODh9ilPHto7NwUo) Thank you for all your help, -Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Letitia James
subject: SIGNATURE REQUESTED: Will you sign my petition?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54933596/380088062/265476937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYjg5ZS1mODY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pHYxNslTvLThGe8dEes416hnRePBhMHJILcw15CjYR8=)
---
**Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our right to choose. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 592 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54933597/380088065/1636200151?code=jtk853-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYjg5ZS1mODY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pHYxNslTvLThGe8dEes416hnRePBhMHJILcw15CjYR8=&emci=de7a35d2-7167-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=7d8ab89e-f869-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54933598/380088066/1636200151?code=jtk853-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYjg5ZS1mODY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pHYxNslTvLThGe8dEes416hnRePBhMHJILcw15CjYR8=&emci=de7a35d2-7167-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=7d8ab89e-f869-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)
---
Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect the right to choose.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down this summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House now under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54933599/380088067/1636200151?code=jtk853-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYjg5ZS1mODY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pHYxNslTvLThGe8dEes416hnRePBhMHJILcw15CjYR8=&emci=de7a35d2-7167-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=7d8ab89e-f869-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot. And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our right to choose. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent. | | Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect the right to choose. Let me be clear: I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down this summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made real progress. I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue. But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we all work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now. | | Thank you for standing with me to defend reproductive rights for every last person. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

**Peter, I’ve seen the numbers and it’s clear to me now that we’re going to lose our House majority.**

Democrats performed incredibly well and won major races across the country. We were so close to keeping our majority. But through underhanded tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression – Republicans barely won the House Majority. _What does this mean for Democrats and our country?_

➡️ They could launch partisan investigations into President Biden and his family.
➡️ They could attempt impeachment proceedings on President Biden.
➡️ They’ve already promised to kick key Democratic Congressmembers off Committees.
➡️ They’ll likely elevate baseless conspiracy theories and spread hatred and violence.

**I’m afraid it will mean chaos for the House, and a disaster for our country.**

House Republicans will use the next two years to elevate Fox News talking points, conspiracies, white supremacy, and more. They’ll be whipping their base into a frenzy to bolster their 2024 chances.

It’s why I’ll keep organizing our communities and holding Republicans accountable. **We have to fight back hard and fight back NOW.**

subject: new territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Folks: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory,
and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. Here's
why:

FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into
Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.

BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this
unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.

NOW, we need all hands on deck to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're
looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline,
but time is running out, and we're falling short.

So much is at stake. We got to this point
without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue
this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in
whatever you can at this critical moment.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31710?t=1008&amount=32&akid=6459%2E3611125%2E6xjzyX ]Please, will you rush a donation of $32 or more right now to split
between me and Tim Ryan so we can defeat Walker and keep Georgia blue?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

Let's go win this.

—Rev. Warnock

name: Katie Porter
subject: Taylor Swift fans know all too well
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Competition is central to capitalism.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15482%2E3422442%2Eoi0jLk)
Taylor Swift fans are seeing firsthand how when one company monopolizes a market, prices soar and consumers suffer. **We know _all too well_ that Ticketmaster’s monopoly enables it to exploit fans for profit.**
Last week, **I was proud to work with colleagues to urge the Department of Justice to investigate.**
The problem doesn’t end with Ticketmaster. Large corporations have taken advantage and created monopolies over all sorts of things--from airline tickets to bread.
**Competition is central to capitalism.** I’ll always stand up to corporations who take advantage of us.
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13721?refcode=EMAD23_TAY_20221121_V1_F_footer&t=2&akid=15482%2E3422442%2Eoi0jLk)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15482%2E3422442%2Eoi0jLk)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). subject: The NRA will always stand up for your rights

body:
Take the survey before it's too late | The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931047:6xlMGyG3N:m:1:3361486117:4F0CA36B027C15D0EE9D46479F84F334:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931047:6xlMGyG3N:m:1:3361486117:4F0CA36B027C15D0EE9D46479F84F334:r)

Peter,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. We rely on input from real firearm owners like YOU, Peter, which is why I am asking you to complete the **Official Gun Registration Survey** IMMEDIATELY.

**[Take the OFFICIAL GUN REGISTRATION SURVEY to tell the NRA how we can best protect your Second Amendment rights.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931047:6xlMGyG3N:m:1:3361486117:4F0CA36B027C15D0EE9D46479F84F334:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931047:6xlMGyG3N:m:1:3361486117:4F0CA36B027C15D0EE9D46479F84F334:r)

Peter, filling out the **Official Gun Registration Survey** only takes a few minutes. **It 's the best way to help the NRA protect your gun rights and stop government overreach.**

Your personalized link to take the survey expires SOON. Our team is counting on you to answer the questions openly and honestly, Peter.

**[Use this personalized link to tell the NRA how we can best protect your right to keep and bear arms.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931047:6xlMGyG3N:m:1:3361486117:4F0CA36B027C15D0EE9D46479F84F334:r)**

Thank you,

Wayne LaPierre
CEO, National Rifle Association

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m getting concerned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932083:J2LzGyGNB:m:1:3371220873:FA1E6CDBE99258CEF92020FAF4185E36:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932083:J2LzGyGNB:m:1:3371220873:FA1E6CDBE99258CEF92020FAF4185E36:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932083:J2LzGyGNB:m:1:3371220873:FA1E6CDBE99258CEF92020FAF4185E36:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932083:J2LzGyGNB:m:1:3371220873:FA1E6CDBE99258CEF92020FAF4185E36:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932083:J2LzGyGNB:m:1:3371220873:FA1E6CDBE99258CEF92020FAF4185E36:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

clean_body: | Peter, Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th. Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible. Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on. Today's Goal: Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters. How we win: By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th. We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want. I sincerely hope you'll answer the call. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but {{unsubscribeUrl}}. name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Let's send Herschel Walker to the US Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Help support Herschel Walker and secure a Senate Majority!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Senator Warnock
subject: The only way I can keep this seat blue and win our critical fight for justice is with your urgent help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters – and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith.
My parents showed me the meaning of hard work – and always told us kids we could do anything we put our minds to. Thanks to their support, I became the first in my family to earn a college degree. Now, thanks to this grassroots team, I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure every child can achieve their American dream.
**But I'll be honest: T****ime is running out before our midnight fundraising deadline –****the only way I can keep this seat blue and win our critical fight for justice is with your urgent help.** **[So I’m personally asking, friend: Will you donate $5 or more right now to help me defend my seat, expand our Democratic Senate majority, and secure a better, brighter future for Georgia and our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54927753/380063314/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5130-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmU5M2QxNS1kNzY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WwWeYsd07CS9YtLRpNPAltX-mEjEP1orBM4eoln7vfs=)**

name: Arizona Democrats
subject: MAGA’s last stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Help us fund our recount team | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZ_xfRVPpwP1VuAQ4-GC43fpO2wuiQIT2TIrFTXUpk4PnmbQ3EptDeHpbpD2AWoz3Znegak9O5q1g9ee9cbhNK26_Ri_rSJSM2VGF6ISG4-Kbyf41vy6kVIINKOGNk3gJY93kdCDRMur38TuffPrO6enA1_i7PONHv5U6kMtrX7AxKA46ZqxF_wu7c795g-3pdcnsbI1LEeTIN56gPDpQSSv9NKmJtAD6pqMYtIDeWnotZLHDrC3A207YI_x_ibTgy9KgjwJufckJ8AYm_tLM0OgU17tazzySohzTmi-OH3PQa7QFeealmwXHiwf-XmILY23ftAuM27Zj5hXjk_e3npWJnNKe2kMt_0A5fHTFeSoVM5YzCnNT7awC-mKDqgFBKyH54ODnrJPNyW8cF9leuAvY3OngeP6ZLKhdlL3ou_Q/3rc/nVuLJnzpQFe3vFI8Z9eqpg/h0/PWEdWUU68XJYik3l21r--ztaBoeHw23CR858F2JCsho)

---
| Team,

We know it’s been a long election cycle, and the holidays are right around the corner.

But when we reached out last week about funding our recount team for the Arizona Attorney General race, we didn’t get the response we needed.

So we’re reaching out real quick before everyone starts their week to ask one more time.

If we want Governor-elect Katie Hobbs to be successful, we have to make sure she has other Democrats in office to have her back. If we don’t take this recount seriously, Republicans will spend four years obstructing every move Gov.-elect Hobbs makes.

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Update: California's 13th District congressional race still has votes left to count. We need this seat and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff & lawyers for what might be another week or more of counting in California.
body:
Still counting ...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48a9fdbd-ec53-43ca-a83e-011d2e79fe55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **_UPDATE :_**** ** Republicans currently have 219 House seats--giving them a three-seat majority--yet, there are a few seats left, and we're in very good shape in most to all of them. _In CA-13, the news is really good news.__Though Adam Gray's currently trailing slightly, The Washington Post election model says that when all votes are counted they expect Gray to win! So let's make doubly sure Gray has the resources to COUNT EVERY VOTE AND WIN THIS RACE!!_ **[To do this, can you give $5, $10, $25 to Adam Gray so he can pay the staffers and lawyers who are the watchdogs in this effort. Let's take this seat and have an even better Thanksgiving!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T253fd4bc-ef46-4f05-804c-76eacdd899f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_THANK YOU!_**
**_Cliff_** On Fri, Nov 18, 2022 at 9:09 AM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **_At this point: EVERY VOTE COUNTS_** **_218 House votes have been called for Republicans, giving them a one-seat majority in the House of Representatives. But, there are still a half dozen races or so outstanding, and every seat matters. _** **[We need CA-13 and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff& lawyers for what might be a two-week-long count in California. Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Adam Gray!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb9d7a8a-11fe-4d6b-8ad2-e43c4d78a285/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_If Democrats can deny Republicans more than a 1-3 seat majority, it will lead to chaos on the GOP side._One Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats.__** **_THIS WOULD BE HUGE. We could get legislation we want put on the House floor this way, to then be ratified by the Senate and signed by Joe Biden. _**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-13 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca676be0-53d1-4a6e-8773-753351695ef7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_One of the races outstanding is California's 13th District. Liberal Democrat Adam Gray is leading conservative Republican, John Duarte, 50.3% to 49.7%. There are still about 30,000 votes left to count. In the areas left to count, there is very good reason to believe we'll pull this off over a Republican in Duarte, who has said he won't work with Democrats in Washington whom he sees as "socialists"_** **[We need this seat and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff& lawyers for what might be a two-week-long count in California. Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Adam Gray!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7de444b-5a08-4c80-a4ef-6b695ac5e676/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks Blue Amp Action Community!!**
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Kevin
subject: Re: Your thank you gift
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I want to give you a token of my appreciation.

| |
---
| | |
---

**YOU DID IT** , Peter!

Your support over the past few months has cultivated this incredible moment.

This is GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy, and I wanted to personally reach out and share the good news! Republicans have taken back the House. Nancy Pelosi has officially been **FIRED!**

We have truly reached a turning point for the future of our great country, Peter and we couldn't have made it happen without your help.

I know how difficult it was to stay politically active this year, but I want you to know that it was _YOUR_ efforts that pushed our candidates over the finish line:
* _**YOU**_ rescued our candidates when they were being bombarded by Democrat attack ads.
* _**YOU**_ helped us recruit bastions of door-knockers who spent hours turning out the vote.
* _**YOU**_ aided our efforts to put up yard signs and billboards all around the country to multiply our winning message.

To show my gratitude, I want to give you a limited edition **FREEDOM WINS** sticker. Please accept this sticker as a token of my appreciation.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931168:JMAlwyGrN:m:1:3331421248:64BF9D2A2A85AA626FEF26026C388EFC:r "Freedom Wins sticker")
---

Peter, America can rest easy knowing that patriots like you are on guard to defend her future!

Thank you for your continued support over the past few months,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931168:JMAlwyGrN:m:1:3331421248:64BF9D2A2A85AA626FEF26026C388EFC:r)
---

Kevin McCarthy

---

name: National Rifle Association
subject: 25 STATES NOW ALLOW CONSTITUTIONAL CARRY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Sign the Petition to Recognize Constitutional Carry Nationwide >> | 25 OF AMERICA'S 50 STATES NOW ALLOW CONSTITUTIONAL CARRY.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930977:JZ0lwyGNg:m:1:3253819041:A63BE6804C08506989B4C942643A51C2:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930977:JZ0lwyGNg:m:1:3253819041:A63BE6804C08506989B4C942643A51C2:r)

Peter,

**25 OF AMERICA 'S 50 STATES NOW ALLOW CONSTITUTIONAL CARRY.**

This is a critical milestone for the NRA, which has championed this movement for over 30 years.

Constitutional carry eliminates the need for government permission before a law-abiding citizen can carry a firearm outside the home. _The NRA firmly believes that the Second Amendment protects Americans' right to self-defense as an inherent and inalienable right._ Now, Georgia has become the 25th state to stand with us.

This is a big win for the American people, but we are still fighting for the other half of the nation to recognize this inalienable right. We are asking ALL patriotic Americans to join us in this fight.

**[Peter, please sign our OFFICIAL Petition to Recognize Constitutional Carry Nationwide IMMEDIATELY.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61930977:JZ0lwyGNg:m:1:3253819041:A63BE6804C08506989B4C942643A51C2:r)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Colorado Springs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I am horrified and heartbroken by the deadly shooting in Colorado Springs. Once again, an entire community is left devastated and traumatized by the senseless epidemic of gun violence in our country. My heart goes out to the people whose lives were taken far too soon, their families and friends, and everyone who was at Club Q on Saturday.
Night clubs like Club Q are supposed to be safe havens for LGBTQ+ people, where they can be free and safe to be themselves. And yet, Club Q, like Pulse before it, has become the site of hatred and violence.
Yesterday, we marked Transgender Day of Remembrance. We mourn and remember the trans people who were taken from us far too soon — including those who we lost at Club Q. We must recommit ourselves to the work of ending the epidemics of gun violence, transphobia, and homophobia in our country and saluting the resilience of trans people everywhere.
I am the proud mom of an incredible trans child, and I will never stop fighting to make sure we build a better, safer, and more just society for her and for our entire beloved LGBTQ+ community in this country.
I want every LGBTQ+ person to know that I hear you, I see you, I appreciate you, and I will never stop fighting for you
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=1&akid=1870%2E420207%2EuVPZrn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1870%2E420207%2EuVPZrn)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

clean_body: Young people terrify the GOP | | Derek- Republicans are TERRIFIED of how much of an impact young people made on this election. They've been racking their brains to see how they could have screwed up with our generation so badly. They have even suggested that we raise the voting age to 21. They are running scared: | ** Young people are tired of the status quo and the way that Republicans are wanting to rule our lives. They wonder why we are so upset when they have made us feel unsafe in schools because of gun violence, continue to destroy our climate to the point where we don't know if we will have a planet to live on, and even try to tell us what to do with our own bodies by taking away our reproductive rights. We're young. We're mad. But we're motivated. The youth vote has helped decide so many races this year. Even as we speak, we just got word that the Arizona Attorney General's race was won by just 510 votes. 510 votes pays off from a great campus organizing effort or even a good digital presence in front of young people. We're planning to do that again but this time in Georgia. We are committing the rest of our campaign funds to help our friends down South re-elect Raphael Warnock and are paying for our volunteers to travel down there. Thank you for everything, Young Democrats of America | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: Adam Schiff
subject: McCarthy plans to elevate MTG and the QAnon Caucus, and retaliate against me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1382%2E5257348%2E_nkDtD ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

Kevin McCarthy went on Fox News yesterday morning to confirm that if he
becomes Speaker, he will retaliate against me and remove me from serving
on the Intelligence Committee.

“You have Adam Schiff... we will not allow him to be on the Intel Committee
either.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em.lEaqBw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1382%2E5257348%2E_nkDtD ]Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) House Minorty Leader exclusive on Fox News with chryon
MCARTHY TO REMOVE SCHIFF (D-CA), SWALWELL (D-CA) & OMAR (D-MN) FROM HOUSE
COMMITTEES

It’s pathetic. And an early sign that he will do the bidding of the most
extreme elements of his party.

McCarthy, the GOP leader who led the charge of over 100 House Republicans
that voted to decertify the 2020 election on January 6, and then went to
grovel at Trump’s feet at Mar-a-Lago, is now promising to do even more of
Trump's dirty work.

And here’s why he’s going to retaliate against me — for the last six
years, I have worked hard to hold Trump and his cronies accountable for
their relentless attacks on our democracy. But that’s Kevin for you.

Under McCarthy’s leadership, Republicans have perpetuated the Big Lie. And
because of the GOP’s midterm flop, extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene
and others in the QAnon crazy caucus will carry immense sway in such a
narrow majority — including in committee positions.

McCarthy is emboldening the far-right extremists, and with these
leadership changes, GOP policy won’t focus on the issues facing Americans.
Instead, they will do nothing but endless and meritless investigations of
President Biden.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em.lEaqBw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1382%2E5257348%2E_nkDtD ]McCarthy’s red wave never made it to the shore, and now he is prepared
to empower the most extreme Republicans in his caucus to gain power. So
please, Derek, can you chip in to help us fight back against
this effort and the many more that are sure to come from McCarthy and
other GOP extremists?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=nov2022_abs_em.z_urWk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1382%2E5257348%2E_nkDtD ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=nov2022_abs_em.MnUrGu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1382%2E5257348%2E_nkDtD ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=nov2022_abs_em.jDy-bt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=1382%2E5257348%2E_nkDtD ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=nov2022_abs_em.uJxYoD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=1382%2E5257348%2E_nkDtD ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=nov2022_abs_em.F3MPrh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1010&akid=1382%2E5257348%2E_nkDtD ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

Thanks for standing with me today.

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | Social Security has provided seniors with help paying for bills, groceries, and other expenses for over 87 years. But Republicans have historically opposed pro-Social Security legislation – they’d rather give handouts to their conservative billionaire buddies than help seniors in need. That’s why our polling division has launched a new research poll to gauge support for Social Security. | | \-- Team Ruiz Polling Division | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . That's why we're going all in to help Herschel fight for victory. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bf4494b99b34a3f937bd8ef828c6a7a&_e=Pr5x-7o8to6yOuup_n-yWJt3b9r3fkJ7rVUaiXqV6iHzTKTbrE2yvXrRrtwd187wr7FUY30f_jQRt1wgABbCTpwNNSj1tckM0LfGZvGHgA_nYkI8mBLjanK4Bxeth-qwiUVjsFnK2MxnAaG01TrIKI2C-lg9jpWF3-40isYjvQP23swKzmfyYEB6ZhpKDDL4fQxuEAKQXJfuy3cAWO_J2mcYkY_J2FThoSzRctqdiK2Z7sciR9uuCofrxUWTtr2QWscgZ-17Y4SWE9iPQACOqoQQ1VON7IABG-W0iHw9_HizbQJ21UzxL54yiUuPgVstfJcbPyOmz3BFYoBD2-92EqJhs7uJnsx7n558M-LYwLMDNv3u1bUq2GDrW-2gxh31SFGmgnQY0J6w5HeicH4TCw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the "British Bulldog" captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill's accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bf4494b99b34a3f937bd8ef828c6a7a&_e=Pr5x-7o8to6yOuup_n-yWJt3b9r3fkJ7rVUaiXqV6iHzTKTbrE2yvXrRrtwd187wr7FUY30f_jQRt1wgABbCTpwNNSj1tckM0LfGZvGHgA_nYkI8mBLjanK4Bxeth-qwiUVjsFnK2MxnAaG01TrIKI2C-lg9jpWF3-40isYjvQP23swKzmfyYEB6ZhpKDDL4fQxuEAKQXJfuy3cAWO_J2mcYkY_J2FThoSzRctqdiK2Z7sciR9uuCofrxUWTtr2Q7BUi8NBpY_NzRx2iXloHYV9E5_whRzdkxCIUG6lyzWnbXAOHkDtE0paDe5lgECclyiwjS9UiKjYu97tSmdcwssjGEbXVp5LV_AR1NPWaTYFc4WIj8pi5jpdK4Ie3lmD4cu9FniuSasMlr56b9cHcHg%3D%3D)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bf4494b99b34a3f937bd8ef828c6a7a&_e=Pr5x-7o8to6yOuup_n-yWJt3b9r3fkJ7rVUaiXqV6iHzTKTbrE2yvXrRrtwd187wr7FUY30f_jQRt1wgABbCTpwNNSj1tckM0LfGZvGHgA_nYkI8mBLjanK4Bxeth-qwiUVjsFnK2MxnAaG01TrIKI2C-lg9jpWF3-40isYjvQP23swKzmfyYEB6ZhpKDDL4fQxuEAKQXJfuy3cAWO_J2mcYkY_J2FThoSzRctqdiK2Z7sciR9uuCofrxUWTtr2QG6oeufS569QXlihU_jjmIJGijQqlSHetAbsB5rM2jCZbD6rYkBB7i8X__4nfLboC6nz5BcoN_wVlbv0sxj3BsoiKIiTyXbRZw0U5zPCHfWRGNM907InI4rfcd7NciukZrVsUdduNyh7rVrMCHYKWaQ%3D%3D) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship**" on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bf4494b99b34a3f937bd8ef828c6a7a&_e=Pr5x-7o8to6yOuup_n-yWJt3b9r3fkJ7rVUaiXqV6iHzTKTbrE2yvXrRrtwd187wr7FUY30f_jQRt1wgABbCTpwNNSj1tckM0LfGZvGHgA_nYkI8mBLjanK4Bxeth-qwiUVjsFnK2MxnAaG01TrIKI2C-lg9jpWF3-40isYjvQP23swKzmfyYEB6ZhpKDDL4fQxuEAKQXJfuy3cAWO_J2mcYkY_J2FThoSzRctqdiK2Z7sciR9uuCofrxUWTtr2QHWfKuxWHsPrqLfmwjDSaJtR0kejASRB2eYxnUXfiV-Ldj4UGEVFcuU2A-uPX8Yrl0nbE_Apb8w0hqdQWPTtUlnFI3QRglYU8r4xS80YjRGiCz9YJGk2e0AeAFwP-a3kHvQHYgXmZLW7MXfz7JfXckQ%3D%3D)_ You'll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill's words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

subject: This team’s grassroots support in 2020 and 2022 helped to defeat Trump and Trumpism, win the Senate, and elect Democrats down the ballot nationwide. I’m counting on you.

body:
Trump’s announcement is a kickoff to what will be a messy Republican primary with candidates competing to be the most extreme MAGA Republican in the race. | |

Democrats stand ready to remind Americans what Trump brought America:
* The worst jobs record since the Great Depression;
* An economy rigged for the super rich with massive tax giveaways to corporations;
* A right-wing Supreme Court that overturned _Roe_ and paved the way for extreme Republicans across the country to criminalize abortion;
* and the absolute chaos that culminated in inciting a mob to attack the Capitol to try to overturn an election he knew he lost.

Trump’s announcement is a kickoff to what will be a messy Republican primary with candidates competing to be the most extreme MAGA Republican in the race. The DNC will be ready for them all. **[If you’re all in to support Democrats and our work in the months and years ahead, I’m asking you to chip in $7 or whatever you can right now to help power our work. clean_body: Trump’s announcement is a kickoff to what will be a messy Republican primary with candidates competing to be the most extreme MAGA Republican in the race. | | Let’s be clear, Derek: Donald Trump was a failure as president. That’s why he lost in 2020, and it’s why he will lose again. This team’s grassroots support in 2020 and 2022 helped to defeat Trump and Trumpism, win the Senate, and elect Democrats down the ballot nationwide. I’m counting on you to chip in $7 today to help continue powering the important work our party is building to lay the foundation and defeat the GOP once again. Democrats stand ready to remind Americans what Trump brought America: The worst jobs record since the Great Depression; An economy rigged for the super rich with massive tax giveaways to corporations; A right-wing Supreme Court that overturned Roe and paved the way for extreme Republicans across the country to criminalize abortion; and the absolute chaos that culminated in inciting a mob to attack the Capitol to try to overturn an election he knew he lost. Trump’s announcement is a kickoff to what will be a messy Republican primary with candidates competing to be the most extreme MAGA Republican in the race. The DNC will be ready for them all. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I know we can keep Georgia blue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Hi, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.
Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.
Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.
**In a race this _neck and neck,_ every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. [So please, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $3 or more now – split between me and Peter Welch – to keep Georgia blue?](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5260?t=2&akid=1213%2E61531%2EGhIZJs)**
[Donate $3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5261?t=4&akid=1213%2E61531%2EGhIZJs)

name: Raphael Warnock (via RBG)
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. 's church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**

[Please, friend, will you chip in $10 or more right now to split between me and Ron Be Gone so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14496?t=6&akid=1589%2E564421%2E4CVKiM) [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14497?t=7&akid=1589%2E564421%2E4CVKiM) I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.

**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever.**

[So please, folks, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more between me and Ron Be Gone to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14496?t=8&akid=1589%2E564421%2E4CVKiM) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Ron Be Gone will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14498?t=9&akid=1589%2E564421%2E4CVKiM)

Thank you,

Reverend Warnock

body:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931027:6PTL-yGN1:m:1:3253819041:2E30C9090E73F680E010D00C96F5D8C9:r)

Peter,

Did you hear what Joe Biden did?

He called us the **_R N A._**

Yikes, Joe.

This President's proposals will only infringe on the rights of those law-abiding who have never, and will never, commit a crime. This isn't a real solution, it isn't true leadership, and it isn't what America needs.

**Even though it's rarely reported, more than a million law-abiding Americans use firearms in self-defense every year - most without ever firing a shot.** Unfortunately, you almost never hear about it on the news.

Here at the NRA, we're working to spread our pro-Second Amendment message far and wide, but we can't do it alone. We're relying on patriots like YOU to help us.

We are asking you to rush in a donation of **$25, $50, or $100 RIGHT NOW** so that we can continue fighting for YOUR rights.

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932130:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932130:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932131:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932132:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932133:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932134:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932135:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932136:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932137:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932130:6QTm-yGGN:m:1:3371220873:275E082B2244BD42AECD9D148C663E9A:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.

name: Rev. Warnock Alert
subject: Georgia will be the key
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221121-8142-header&t=1&akid=8142%2E434096%2EuIY8WZ)
Derek,
Rev. Warnock is advancing to a runoff, proving once again that Georgia is the key to the Democratic majority.
We have another chance to hold onto our critical Senate majority -- but we need YOUR help.
With less than ONE MONTH to turn out Democrats across the state, your support will be crucial in continuing to fuel our voter outreach program.
**[Can we count on you to rush a donation split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and John Fetterman so we can maintain our momentum and start things off on the right foot?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221121-1?refcode=em20221121-8142&refcode2=8142_434096_uIY8WZ&akid=8142%2E434096%2EuIY8WZ)**
**[Donate $5 Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221121-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221121-8142&refcode2=8142_434096_uIY8WZ&akid=8142%2E434096%2EuIY8WZ)**
Republicans are already working to mobilize their voters, and we can’t afford to fall behind.
This race is so close, and your next donation could be the difference between keeping this seat blue or losing all of our progress.
— Georgia Democrats

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8142%2E434096%2EuIY8WZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8142%2E434096%2EuIY8WZ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Your Signature Pending (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: investigating Donald Trump
body:
Did you see what Senator Amy Klobuchar said on NBC after the FBI raided Mar-a-Lago? | | |

clean_body: HELP: Don't give Pelosi the credit card! | | | | | Friend, The radical Biden agenda could still be forced down our throats for another year. Here’s how... Now that Congress has passed a short-term continuing resolution (CR) expiring in December to appropriate money for the federal government, another spending fight will come right before Christmas. In December, Pelosi and Schumer could pass one last omnibus spending bill to fund their left wing priorities until October 2023. After the November elections, the new Congress won’t be sworn in until January. So a December spending bill would allow Schumer and Pelosi to fund Joe Biden’s failed agenda for a third year —even after voters reject it! That’s why Heritage Action is FIGHTING BACK against this bill, just like we’ve successfully fought back against Biden’s agenda across the country. Throughout 2021 and 2022, we’ve consistently STOPPED Biden’s most radical priorities with Key Votes in Congress. Now, we have a chance to STOP this omnibus and DEFUND the rest of Biden’s radical agenda in 2023.But we can’t do it without you. | | | | Friend, if Pelosi and Schumer lose their majorities, they’ll be a lame duck Congress – voted out by the people – and we can’t let a lame duck Congress decide America’s future. The Pelosi-Schumer omnibus would totally ignore the will of the American people and keep Biden’s MOST unpopular policies in place: Title IX changes will go into effect The IRS’ ranks will be doubled Open border policies will persist You won’t let this happen, right? | | Friend, blocking the Pelosi-Schumer omnibus is CRITICAL for America’s future. That’s why we’re putting all of our influence into STOPPING this bill, by keeping Congress accountable to YOU. If conservatives in Congress stand up to this bill, we can DEFUND the ENTIRE BIDEN AGENDA next year. But our work – stopping this omnibus, fighting back against the Left’s ESG agenda, blocking Biden’s priorities, and everything in between –**is only possible because of grassroots supporters like you. Friend, conservatives should NOT let the Democrats force through an agenda that Americans voted to stop. But we need YOUR SUPPORT to keep Congress accountable to the people. | | Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director Heritage Action for America | | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: new territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight.

|

| Peter: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. Here's why:

• FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.

• BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.

**• NOW, we need _all hands on deck_ to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short.

So much is at stake. We got to this point without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment.

Fellow Conservative,

A lot of people didn't think we had a shot.

The "experts" in the media didn't believe Herschel Walker could make his way back from a double-digit deficit this summer.

But he did make his way back thanks to generous support from patriots like you. **But Herschel Walker spent every cent to get this far.**

Meanwhile, Chuck Schumer and Raphael Warnock have a massive arsenal to unleash on us in the runoff.

clean_body: We aren’t in the business of retreating the last Georgia runoff The last race of 2022 | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, A lot of people didn't think we had a shot. The "experts" in the media didn't believe Herschel Walker could make his way back from a double-digit deficit this summer. But he did make his way back thanks to generous support from patriots like you. But Herschel Walker spent every cent to get this far. Meanwhile, Chuck Schumer and Raphael Warnock have a massive arsenal to unleash on us in the runoff. | | | But we can demolish their cash advantage if everyone reading this message makes an emergency contribution of $35. "Please help us deliver the knockout blow by rushing an emergency donation in the next hour and help us win the final race of 2022." My very best, Nikki Haley | | | | | Paid for by Stand for America PAC.
